title: Tamil Nadu’s DMK  Chief Minister M.K.  Stalin and Sri Lanka
body_lines: On  May 19 this year, the Panama-registered general cargo vessel “Tan Binh 99”  departed  at 8.28 am from the Chennai harbour in  India with 9000 tons of rice, 200 tons of milk poweder nd 24 tons of essential medicines. Its destination was  Sri Lanka’s Colombo port. This was the first consignment of  a generous  emergency aid package from the Tamil Nadu state of India to  its Island neighbour Sri Lanka. Writing in the “Frontline’newsmagazine, RK Radhakrishnan described  the gift as a “first of sorts where a  province in a developing country  was extending its assistance to another country”.

Writing further in Frontline,  RK Radhakrishnan observed thus- “Tamil Nadu decided to extend humanitarian assistance to Sri Lanka in the form of rice and other essential commodities, taking into consideration the plight of the people following the economic deterioration of the island nation. This is a marked shift in the stand of political parties in Tamil Nadu, which have in the past demanded a separate Tamil nation in Sri Lanka. It also sets the stage for enhanced interaction between the people of the two regions.”

According to current exchange rates , an Indian rupee equals 4.61 Sri Lankan rupees/cents. The  overall emergency gift to Sri Lanka from Tamil Nadu is estimated at   1230 million  Indian rupees. The total aid  consists of 40,000 tons of rice, 100-plus life-saving drugs and 500 tons of milk powder.   The first consignment from  Tamil Nadu amounted to over Two Billion Sri Lankan rupees in value. On May 18th Tamil Nadu chief minister MK Stalin was at the Chennai  port to flag off the loading  of cargo destined to Sri Lanka.

The first consignment of  aid from the people of Tamil Nadu to the people of Sri Lanka  reached the Colombo dock in due coutse and was  gratefully received.It was distributed to all districts in  the Island. On May 4th,  just  five days before his resignation, the then Prime Minister Mahinda Rajapaksa wrote to chief minister  Stalin, thanking him for the humanitarian assistance. “I wish to thank you and the Tamil Nadu government on behalf of the people of Sri Lanka, for viewing the country’s crisis from a humanitarian standpoint, rather than as a problem concerning another country.” Stated Mahinda in the letter .

On June 4th, Sri Lanka’s high commissioner to India, Milinda Moragoda paid a courtesy call on  Tamil  Nadu chief minister MK Stalin. The last time aa Sri Lankan envoy to India had met a Tamil Nadu chief minister  in Chennai was way back in 2011. Veteran Indian journalist PK Balachandran writes as follows in “NewsIn.Asia” about the  Stalin-Moragoda meeting-

“The High Commissioner thanked the Chief Minister and the people of Tamil Nadu for the humanitarian assistance worth of LKR two billion that they recently extended to Sri Lanka to help it manage the current economic crisis.In response, the Chief Minister observed that he was concerned about the situation in Sri Lanka and had made arrangements to immediately dispatch the first shipment of essential commodities. He added that a second shipment is also in line to be dispatched and that a few more shipments are expected.”

“The High Commissioner and the Chief Minister discussed an array of areas pertaining to the relationship between Sri Lanka and the State of Tamil Nadu, including the fishermen’s issue. The two dignitaries reviewed the ancient and strong ethnic, cultural and religious affinities between Tamil Nadu and Sri Lanka and discussed the ways to further strengthen them.”

“In this regard, Chief Minister Stalin requested Sri Lanka to install a statue of the celebrated Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar in a suitable premise in Sri Lanka, such as a university. The High Commissioner welcomed the suggestion and undertook to support and facilitate this initiative.”

“With a view to having a better coordination on all aspects of the relationship between Sri Lanka and the State of Tamil Nadu, High Commissioner Moragoda requested the Chief Minister to designate a focal point at state level. The High Commissioner invited Chief Minister Stalin to visit Sri Lanka as well”

The refreshing  signs of change in the relationship between India’s Tamil Nadu state and Sri Lanka is a very welcome feature although iit is perhaps too early to  gauge the future in this regard.India is our closest neighbour and within India ,the southern state of Tamil Nadu with a 72 million population  is the closest  Indian state to Sri Lanka. Both Tamil Nadu and Sri Lanka are somewhat inter-twined historically and geographically.The Dravidian language Tamil is the  predominant language spoken in Tamil Nadu which means the land or country of the Tamils. More than 25% of the Sri Lankan population are  classified as Tamil – speaking people. A substantial number of Sri Lankans of different ethnicities are descendants of people who migrated to the Island from the South Indian states of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
DMK members of Parliament will donate their one month’s salary towards Sri Lanka aid

In recent times , political developments in Tamil Nadu have  had much  impact on Sri Lanka and vice versa.Hence the the  politicl conduct of  the  Tamil Nadu chief minister is of  great  concrern and importance   to Sri  Lanka.  In that context  the  initiative taken by the Davida Munnetra Kazhagham(DMK) chief minister  Stalin in rendering humanitarin assistance to Sri Lanka deserves much praise. If utilised constructively, it could be the harbinger of  transformed relations  of a positive nature between the Island nation and the  South Indian state. If such a relationship could evolve , it would prove vastly beneficial to the people of Sri Lanka in more ways than one.

Such a relationship may have been unimaginable in the past but  hopefully it may be possible in the future.The  DMK electoral victory in  May last year and the ascendancy of Stalin as chief minister  seems to have mde a qualitative difference to Tamil Nadu. The pragmatic   chief minister has earned much kudos  during the past year for running  smoothly efficient administration. It is against this backdrop therefore that this column focuses on Tamil Nadu chief minister Stalin, from a Sri Lankan perspective,  in a two part article.Let me begin with a brief reference to  Stalin’s party the DMK and its erstwhile leader Karunanidhi, his father.

Muthuvel Karunanidhi, known to the Tamil-speaking world as “Kalaignar” (artiste),  passed away at the age of 94 in Chennai on 7 August 2018. Karunanidhi was a versatile, multi-faceted personality. In his eventful life “Kalaignar” was a journalist, editor, dramatist, stage actor, film script writer, short story writer, novelist, literary commentator, poet, lyricist, film producer and TV channel proprietor. Karunanidhi has written the screenplay and dialogues for 64 films. He has written the story or screenplay without dialogues for 11 other films.

It was Karunanidhi’s entry into filmdom which brought him much recognition and more remuneration in early life despite his lack of tertiary education. His rise in cinema helped him greatly to carve out a name for himself as a politician too. .  “Kalaignar” Karunanidhi’s ascendancy in politics basically corresponded with that of the DMK’s rise in Tamil Nadu

Karunanidhi  served as  Chief Minister of India’s Tamil Nadu state for a total of 19 years. He was Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu five times from 1969-71, 1971-76, 1989-91, 1996-2001 and 2006-11. No other Tamil Nadu chief minister has been in office for so long. Another record was that of being party leader for nearly 50 years. He was the undisputed leader of the Dravida Munnera Kazhagham (Dravidian Progressive Federation) since 1969, leading the party through thick and thin for 49 years. The Dravidian patriarch was first elected to the State legislative assembly in 1957 and never lost an election he contested personally since then. No Indian politician can boast of such an unbroken lengthy  record. “Kalaignar” Muthuvel Karunanidhi was no ordinary politico but a veritable political institution.

Muthuvel Karunanidhi Stalin or MK Stalin is the  third son of Muthuvel Karunanidhi who had six children from three wives. Karunanidhi’s first wife Padmavathy was the sister of well-known playback singer and music composer “Chidambaram” Jayaraman.She died shortly after giving birth to a son MK Muthu. After Padmavathy’s death Karunanidhi  married Dayalu and had three sons and a daughter by her. The sons are Alagiri, Stalin and Thamilarasu and the daughter is Selvi. In later years Karunanidhi had another wife Dharmambal alias Rajathy whose daughter is Kanimozhi.

Stalin is Karunanidhi’s fourth child and third son. He was born on March 1st 1953 in Madras now known as Chennai. Karunanidhi had named his eldest son Muthu  after his father Muthuvel. His second son Alagiri was named after well-known DK activist Pattukkottai Alagirisamy known as “Anjaanenjan Azhagiri”. In the case of his third son Stalin. Karunanidhi had originally named him Aiyadurai after his paternal grandfather Aiyadurai. However four days later,  the Soviet Union’s dictatorial ruler Joseh Stalin  died on March 5th 1953. Though named at birth in 1878 as Ioseb Jughashvil, he had   changed it in 1912  to Stalin meaning man of steel. Karunanidhi being a long- distance admirer of Stalin  registered  his new born son’s name as  Stalin  instead of Aiyadurai to honour the Communist stalwart.

Stalin had his primary and secondary education at the MCC Higher secondary school in Chetpet. By his own  frank admission young Stalin did not shine in studies or excel in sports, He was not even an able orator in Tamil. Furthermore  some of his teachers did not like his “communist”  name Stalin  or his father’s  Dravidian politics. There was one master  who would go through the daily ritual of rapping Stalin’s knuckled without any reason.Stalin completed his Pre-University Certificate(PUC) studies at Vivekananda College. Thereafter he enrolled at  Presidency College and followed  a BA degree  course in History.  Stalin dropped out without completing his studies in 1973 but three years later got his degree as an external student of Mardras University.

With his father becoming an MLA (Member of Legislative Assembly) in 1957, Stalin got interested in politics from childhood. His entry into active politics was at the age of 14 in 1967.  Karunanidhi’s nephew and Stalin’s cousin “Murasoli”Maran contested the   Madras South Parliament constituency by-election and young Stalin got involved in the election campaign. A year later in 1968,  15 year old Stalin launched the Gopalapuram DMK youth organization. The Karunanidhi residence was in Gopalapuram. This was the forerunner to the DMK’s youth wing.  Stalin identified himself with the DMK youth wing and built it up  as a formidable organization over   the years. He was the leader of the  DMK youth wing known as “Ilainjar Ani” for about three decades.. Salin was dubbed as “Thalapathy” (commander)  by his youthful disciples.In 1973 he was elected to he DMK general council.

Stalin’s political baptism of fire was in 1976. The then Indian Prime Minister Indira Gandhi declared  a state of emergency  and  clamped down on democratic rule in June  1975 when she was unseated through an election petition. The DMK held the reins in Tamil Nadu with  Karunanidhi as chief minister. Stalin himself got married during emergency rule on August 25th 1975 to Durga also known as Shantha. Karunanidhi and his DMK govt strongly opposed the emergency which angered Indira. On January 31st 1976, Indira Gandhi got the DMK govt dismissed and declared presidential rule. Thousands of DMK stalwarts and activists were  arrested and detained without trial under the Maintenance of Internal Security Act(MISA).

Though Karunanidhi was not arrested,  his newly married  politically active son was arrested on February 1st 1976 and jailed under the MISA. When the Police was taking Stalin away, Karunanidhi told his son not to be disheartened and that Indira Gandhi was launching Stalin’s political career by arresting him. Stalin was  kept in a cell at the Central prison in Chennai  amidst horrible conditions.He was  assaulted several times.

On one occasion  Stalin was brutally assaulted with rods. Unable to bear this sight, former Chennai Mayor and  Chengalpattu MP DMK  C. Chittibabu fell on top of Stalin and shielded him. Chittibabu was mercilessly beaten resulting in him losing consciousness and soon passing away. This brought an end to the beatings. Stalin was detained for 13 months under MISA regulations. The silver lining was that he managed to complete his BA studies during this time.

After being released Stalin plunged into full -time politics. As his father predicted the detention during emergency rule was indeed a launching pad for  Stalin’s political career. He first contested the “Aayiram Vilakku”(housand lights) constituency withing Chennai city limits in 1984. He lost. In 1989 he contested again, won and became an MLA for the first time. He lost again in the 1991 polls. He was triumphant at Aayiram Vilakku in the 1 996, 2001 and 2006 state elections. In 2011 Stalin shifted to Kolathur a Chennai suburban constituency and won. He retained Kolathur in 2016 as well as in th 2021 election.

The earlier system of  Municipal  elections was amended and provision was made for a directly elected  Mayor in 1996. Stalin contested the Chennai(formerly Madras) municipal corporation elections in 1996 and became the city’s first directly elected  Mayor. He proved to be an able administrator and implemented   infra-structure development projects. Apart from schemes of  road widening, drinking water supply, electrification, schools, health clinics  and drainage improvement, Mayor Stalin also constructed nine fly-over bridges. He also streamlined garbage clearance and road maintenance by privatizing them.

Mayor Stalin’s pet project however was a beautification scheme for the city known as “Singaara Chennai”(Beautiful Chennai). He received much praise  for this. He was re-elected as Chennaai Mayor in 2001. Although Stalin would have liked to continue as the first citizen of Chennai for another term after 2001 ,he was debarred from doing so by AIADMK chief minister Jayalalitha Jayaram who passed legislation with retrospective effect   in 2002 forbidding  persons from being Mayor and MLA  simultaneously. Stalin opted to be a legislator.

Stalin also gained ascendancy within the party. He first became secretary of the DMK Youth wing in 1982 and served in that capacity for a very long time. In 2003 , Stalin became deputy general secretary of the DMK. In 2008 he was elected as Treasurer of the DMK. The DMK formed the State Govt in 2006 with Karunanidhi as chief minister.  Stalin was appointed  Minister for Rural Development and Local Administration.In May 2009, Karunanidhi created the post of deputy chief minister and appointed his son  as “Thunai Mudhalvar”. The DMK suffered a great debacle in the 2011 Tamil Nadu election. The  party got only 23 seats and even  forfeited the leader of the opposition post to actor Vijayakanth whose Desiya Mutpoakku Dravida Kazhagam(DMDK) got 29 seats.

While the father continued to be  party leader, the son began to consolidate himself within the DMK and became the de facto leader.With his health deteriorating. Karunanidhi formally “anointed” Stalin as his political  heir in January 2013. Addressing party office-bearers at a special meeting,  Karunanidhi said, “I will work for the upliftment and development of people till my last breath. For the question `what after me`, Stalin, who is seated here, is the answer, and you should not forget this.”

The 2016 State elections saw the nonagenarian  Karunanidhi now confined to a wheel chair take a back seat during the election campaign. Stalin spearheaded the DMK led alliance  into getting 98 seats of which the DMK shae was 89. The Jayalalithaa led AIADMK  was re-elected  to power with 136 seats. Stalin became leader of the opposition. In 2016  September Jayalalithaa fell seriously ill and OS Panneerselvam became acting Chief Minister. In December 2016 Jayalalithaa passed away. Edappaadi K Palaniswamy became the AIADMK chief minister.

In January 2017,  Stalin was formally  elevated in the party hierarchy as “Seyal Thalaiver” or working President. While the indisposed Karunanidhi remained  the nominal DML president, the party closed ranks behind Stalin’s leadership. Karunanidhi passed away in August 2018 and Stalin was unanimously elected President of the DMK. There were many who doubted whether Stalin could fill the void caused by Karunanidhi’s demise. Also Stalin was compared (unfairly) to his illustrious father and found wanting.

While delivering his inaugural speech as DMK president, Stalin struck a responsive chord within the audience by  repeating the words used by Karunanidhi in addressing a party gathering. Stalin said, “En uyirinum melana anbu udan pirapukkaley (my beloved siblings who I love more than life itself).” He then turned emotional and said  that he was totally  unlike  his father. “I don’t know to talk like him, I cannot talk like him, I cannot own the language like him. But I stand before you with the guts to try anything.” Stalin  then pledged to protect, cherish and advance the four founding principles of the party. “I aim to lead Tamil Nadu on the path of self-respect, equality, social justice using this party,” said the new President of the DMK.

Stalin was true to his word and strove to lead the DMK along the course charted by Annadurai and Karunanidhi. He proved his mettle in the 2019 Lok Sabha elections  when the DMK led alliance won 38 of the 39 seats allocated to Tamil Nadu in the Indian Parliament. Stalin has demonstrated his “winnability” again by leading the DMK to victory in the 2021 polls.
This Article  was written for the “Political Pulse” Column Appearing in the “Daily FT”of June 15th 2022.It can be accessed here-

si.title: තමිල්නාඩුවේ DMK මහ ඇමති එම්.කේ. ස්ටාලින් සහ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව
body_lines: මෙම වසරේ මැයි මස 19 වන දින පැනමාවේ ලියාපදිංචි සාමාන්‍ය භාණ්ඩ ප්‍රවාහන නෞකාවක් වන "Tan Binh 99" උදෑසන 8.28 ට ඉන්දියාවේ චෙන්නායි වරායෙන් සහල් ටොන් 9000 ක්, කිරිපිටි ටොන් 200 ක් සහ අත්‍යවශ්‍ය ඖෂධ ටොන් 24 ක් සමඟින් පිටත් විය. එහි ගමනාන්තය වූයේ ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ කොළඹ වරායයි. මෙය ඉන්දියාවේ තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තයෙන් එහි දූපත් අසල්වැසි ශ්‍රී ලංකාව වෙත ත්‍යාගශීලී හදිසි ආධාර පැකේජයක පළමු තොගය විය. "Frontline'newsmagazine හි ලියමින් RK රාධක්‍රිෂ්ණන් ත්‍යාගය විස්තර කළේ "සංවර්ධනය වෙමින් පවතින රටක පළාතක් වෙනත් රටකට ආධාර කරන පළමු ආකාරයේ" ලෙසයි.

Frontline වෙත තවදුරටත් ලියමින් RK රාධක්‍රිෂ්ණන් මෙසේ නිරීක්ෂණය කළේය- “දිවයින ජාතියේ ආර්ථික පරිහානියත් සමඟ ජනතාවගේ දුක්ඛිත තත්ත්වය සැලකිල්ලට ගනිමින් සහල් සහ අනෙකුත් අත්‍යවශ්‍ය භාණ්ඩ වශයෙන් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට මානුෂීය ආධාර ලබා දීමට තමිල්නාඩුව තීරණය කළේය. මෙය අතීතයේ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව තුළ වෙනම දෙමළ ජාතියක් ඉල්ලා සිටි තමිල්නාඩුවේ දේශපාලන පක්ෂවල ස්ථාවරයේ කැපී පෙනෙන වෙනසක් වේ. එය කලාප දෙකේ ජනතාව අතර වැඩිදියුණු වූ අන්තර්ක්‍රියා සඳහා වේදිකාව ද සකසයි.

වත්මන් විනිමය අනුපාතවලට අනුව, ඉන්දියානු රුපියලක් ශ්‍රී ලංකා රුපියල්/ශත 4.61 ට සමාන වේ. තමිල්නාඩුවෙන් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට ලැබුණු සමස්ත හදිසි ත්‍යාගය ඉන්දීය රුපියල් මිලියන 1230ක් ලෙස ගණන් බලා ඇත. සම්පූර්ණ ආධාරය සහල් ටොන් 40,000ක්, ජීවිතාරක්ෂක ඖෂධ 100කට වැඩි ප්‍රමාණයක් සහ කිරිපිටි ටොන් 500කින් සමන්විත වේ. තමිල්නාඩුවෙන් පැමිණි පළමු තොගයේ වටිනාකම ශ්‍රී ලංකා රුපියල් බිලියන දෙකකට අධිකය. මැයි 18 වැනිදා තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමැති එම්.කේ. ස්ටාලින් චෙන්නායි වරායට පැමිණ සිටියේ ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට පැමිණීමට නියමිත භාණ්ඩ ප්‍රවාහනය කිරීම ආරම්භ කිරීමටය.

තමිල්නාඩු ජනතාවගෙන් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවාසීන් වෙත ලැබුණු පළමු ආධාර තොගය නියමිත වේලාවට කොළඹ තටාකාංගනය වෙත ළඟා වූ අතර එය කෘතවේදීව පිළිගන්නා ලදී.එය දිවයිනේ සියලුම දිස්ත්‍රික්ක වෙත බෙදා හරින ලදී. ඉල්ලා අස්වීමට දින පහකට පෙර, මැයි 4 වන දින, එවකට අගමැති මහින්ද රාජපක්ෂ, මානුෂීය ආධාර සඳහා ස්තුති කරමින්, මහ ඇමති ස්ටාලින් වෙත ලිපියක් යවා ඇත. "රටේ අර්බුදය වෙනත් රටක ගැටලුවක් ලෙස සලකනවාට වඩා මානුෂීය දෘෂ්ටිකෝණයකින් බැලීම ගැන ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ජනතාව වෙනුවෙන් මම ඔබට සහ තමිල්නාඩු රජයට ස්තූතිවන්ත වීමට කැමැත්තෙමි." මහින්ද එම ලිපියේ සඳහන් කර ඇත.

ජූනි 4 වන දින ඉන්දියාවේ ශ්‍රී ලංකා මහ කොමසාරිස් මිලින්ද මොරගොඩ තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමති එම්.කේ ස්ටාලින් හමුවිය. ඉන්දියාවේ සිටින ශ්‍රී ලංකා නියෝජිතයෙකු අවසන් වරට තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමතිවරයෙකු චෙන්නායිහිදී මුණගැසී ඇත්තේ 2011 වසරේදීය. ප්‍රවීණ ඉන්දීය මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු වන පී.කේ. බාලචන්ද්‍රන් ස්ටාලින්-මොරගොඩ හමුව පිළිබඳව "NewsIn.Asia" වෙත මෙසේ ලියයි.

වත්මන් ආර්ථික අර්බුදය කළමනාකරණය කර ගැනීම සඳහා ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට මෑතකදී ලබා දුන් රුපියල් බිලියන දෙකක වටිනාකමින් යුත් මානුෂීය ආධාර පිළිබඳව මහ කොමසාරිස්වරයා තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමතිවරයාට සහ ජනතාවට ස්තූති කළේය. ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳව සහ අත්‍යාවශ්‍ය භාණ්ඩ පළමු නැව්ගත කිරීම වහාම යැවීමට කටයුතු යොදා තිබුණි. දෙවන නැව්ගත කිරීමක් ද යැවීමට නියමිත බවත් තවත් නැව්ගත කිරීම් කිහිපයක් අපේක්ෂා කරන බවත් ඔහු පැවසීය.

ශ්‍රී ලංකාව සහ තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තය අතර පවතින සබඳතාවයට අදාළ ධීවර ප්‍රශ්නය ඇතුළු ක්ෂේත්‍ර ගණනාවක් පිළිබඳව මහ කොමසාරිස්වරයා සහ මහ ඇමැතිවරයා සාකච්ඡා කළහ. තමිල්නාඩුව සහ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව අතර පවතින පෞරාණික සහ ශක්තිමත් ජනවාර්ගික, සංස්කෘතික සහ ආගමික සබඳතා සමාලෝචනය කළ සම්භාවනීය අමුත්තන් දෙදෙනා ඒවා තවදුරටත් ශක්තිමත් කිරීමේ ක්‍රම පිළිබඳව සාකච්ඡා කළහ.

“මේ සම්බන්ධයෙන් ප්‍රධාන අමාත්‍ය ස්ටාලින් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටියේ කීර්තිමත් දෙමළ කවියෙකු සහ දාර්ශනිකයෙකු වන තිරුවල්ලුවාර්ගේ ප්‍රතිමාවක් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ විශ්වවිද්‍යාලයක් වැනි සුදුසු පරිශ්‍රයක ස්ථාපිත කරන ලෙසයි. මහ කොමසාරිස්වරයා මෙම යෝජනාව පිළිගත් අතර මෙම මුලපිරීම සඳහා සහාය වීමට සහ පහසුකම් සැලසීමට කටයුතු කළේය.

“ශ්‍රී ලංකාව සහ තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තය අතර සම්බන්ධතාවයේ සියලු අංශ සම්බන්ධයෙන් වඩා හොඳ සම්බන්ධීකරණයක් ඇති කර ගැනීමේ අදහසින්, මහ කොමසාරිස් මොරගොඩ ප්‍රාන්ත මට්ටමින් කේන්ද්‍රස්ථානයක් නම් කරන ලෙස මහ ඇමැතිවරයාගෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටියේය. ශ්‍රී ලංකාවටත් පැමිණෙන ලෙස මහ කොමසාරිස් ස්ටාලින්ට ආරාධනා කළා”

ඉන්දියාවේ තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තය සහ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව අතර සබඳතාවයේ වෙනසක ප්‍රබෝධමත් සලකුනු ඉතා සාදරයෙන් පිළිගත හැකි ලක්ෂණයක් වුවද මේ සම්බන්ධයෙන් අනාගතය මැන බැලීමට එය ඉක්මන් වැඩිය. ඉන්දියාව අපගේ සමීපතම අසල්වැසියා වන අතර ඉන්දියාව තුළ දකුණු තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තය වේ. මිලියන 72 ක ජනගහනයක් සිටින ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට ආසන්නතම ඉන්දීය ප්‍රාන්තය වේ. තමිල්නාඩුව සහ ශ්‍රී ලංකාව යන දෙකම ඓතිහාසිකව හා භූගෝලීය වශයෙන් තරමක් එකිනෙකට බැඳී ඇත. ද්‍රවිඩ භාෂාව දෙමළ යනු තමිල්නාඩුවේ කතා කරන ප්‍රමුඛ භාෂාව වන අතර එයින් අදහස් වන්නේ දෙමළ ජනයාගේ දේශය හෝ රට යන්නයි. ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ජනගහනයෙන් 25%කට වැඩි ප්‍රමාණයක් දෙමළ කතා කරන ජනතාව ලෙස වර්ග කර ඇත. විවිධ ජාතීන්ට අයත් ශ්‍රී ලාංකිකයන්ගෙන් සැලකිය යුතු ප්‍රමාණයක් දකුණු ඉන්දියාවේ තමිල්නාඩු සහ කේරළ ප්‍රාන්තවලින් දිවයිනට සංක්‍රමණය වූ මිනිසුන්ගෙන් පැවත එන්නන් වේ.
DMK මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් තම මාසයක වැටුප ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ ආධාර සඳහා පරිත්‍යාග කරනු ඇත

මෑත කාලවලදී තමිල්නාඩුවේ දේශපාලන වර්ධනයන් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට සහ අනෙක් අතට බොහෝ බලපෑමක් ඇති කර ඇත. එබැවින් තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමතිවරයාගේ දේශපාලන හැසිරීම ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට විශාල එකඟතාවයක් සහ වැදගත්කමක් දරයි. එම සන්දර්භය තුළ ඩේවිඩ මුන්නේත්‍ර කසාගම් (ඩීඑම්කේ) ප්‍රධාන අමාත්‍ය ස්ටාලින් ශ්‍රී ලංකාවට මානුෂීය ආධාර ලබා දීම සඳහා ගත් මුලපිරීම බොහෝ ප්‍රශංසනීය විය යුතුය. එය සාධනීය ලෙස භාවිතා කරන්නේ නම්, එය දූපත් ජාතිය සහ දකුණු ඉන්දීය රාජ්‍යය අතර ධනාත්මක ස්වභාවයේ පරිවර්තනීය සබඳතාවල පෙර නිමිත්ත විය හැකිය. එවැනි සබඳතාවයක් වර්ධනය විය හැකි නම්, එය ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ මිනිසුන්ට බොහෝ ආකාරවලින් ප්‍රයෝජනවත් වනු ඇත.

එවැනි සම්බන්ධයක් අතීතයේ සිතාගත නොහැකි වූවක් විය හැකි නමුත් අනාගතයේ දී එය හැකි වනු ඇතැයි අපේක්ෂා කෙරේ. පසුගිය වසරේ මැයි මාසයේ දී ඩීඑම්කේ මැතිවරණ ජයග්‍රහණය සහ ස්ටාලින් මහ ඇමති ධුරයට පත්වීම තමිල්නාඩුවට ගුණාත්මක වෙනසක් ඇති කර ඇති බව පෙනේ. ප්‍රායෝගික ප්‍රධාන අමාත්‍යවරයා පසුගිය වසර තුළ සුමට කාර්යක්ෂම පරිපාලනයක් පවත්වාගෙන යාම සඳහා බොහෝ ප්‍රශංසා උපයා ඇත. කොටස් දෙකකින් යුත් ලිපියකින් ශ්‍රී ලාංකික දෘෂ්ටිකෝණයකින් තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමති ස්ටාලින් ගැන මෙම තීරුව අවධානය යොමු කරන්නේ මෙම පසුබිමට එරෙහිවය. ස්ටාලින්ගේ පක්ෂය වන DMK සහ එහි හිටපු නායක කරුණානිධි, ඔහුගේ පියා ගැන කෙටි සඳහනකින් මම ආරම්භ කරමි.

මුතුවේල් කරුණානිධි, දෙමළ කතා කරන ලෝකය "කලයිඤ්ඤර්" (කලාකරු) ලෙසින් හඳුන්වනු ලබන අතර, 2018 අගෝස්තු 7 වන දින චෙන්නායිහිදී වයස අවුරුදු 94 දී අභාවප්‍රාප්ත විය. කරුණානිධි බහුවිධ, බහු මුහුණුවර සහිත පෞරුෂයකි. ඔහුගේ සිදුවීම් බහුල ජීවිතයේදී "කලේඤ්ඤර්" මාධ්‍යවේදියෙකු, සංස්කාරකවරයෙකු, නාට්‍යකරුවෙකු, වේදිකා නළුවෙකු, චිත්‍රපට පිටපත් රචකයෙකු, කෙටිකතා රචකයෙකු, නවකතාකරුවෙකු, සාහිත්‍ය විචාරකයෙකු, කවියෙකු, ගීත රචකයෙකු, චිත්‍රපට නිෂ්පාදකයෙකු සහ රූපවාහිනී නාලිකා හිමිකරුවෙකු විය. කරුණානිධි විසින් චිත්‍රපට 64ක තිර රචනය සහ දෙබස් රචනා කර ඇත. ඔහු තවත් චිත්‍රපට 11ක් සඳහා දෙබස් නොමැතිව කතාව හෝ තිර රචනය ලියා ඇත.

තෘතීයික අධ්‍යාපනයක් නොමැතිකම තිබියදීත් මුල් කාලයේ දී ඔහුට බොහෝ පිළිගැනීමක් සහ වැඩි වේතනයක් ගෙන දුන්නේ කරුණානිධි සිනමාවට පිවිසීමයි. ඔහු සිනමාවේ නැගීම දේශපාලකයෙකු ලෙස ද නමක් ගොඩනගා ගැනීමට ඔහුට බෙහෙවින් ඉවහල් විය. . "කලෙයිඤ්ඤාර්" කරුණානිධිගේ දේශපාලනයේ නැගීම මූලික වශයෙන් තමිල්නාඩුවේ ඩී.එම්.කේ. නැගීම සමග අනුරූප විය.

කරුණානිධි ඉන්දියාවේ තමිල්නාඩු ප්‍රාන්තයේ මහ ඇමතිවරයා ලෙස වසර 19ක් කටයුතු කළේය. ඔහු 1969-71, 1971-76, 1989-91, 1996-2001 සහ 2006-11 දක්වා පස් වතාවක් තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමතිවරයා විය. වෙනත් කිසිම තමිල්නාඩු මහ ඇමතිවරයෙකු මෙතරම් කාලයක් එම ධුරයේ සිටියේ නැත. තවත් වාර්තාවක් වූයේ වසර 50කට ආසන්න කාලයක් පක්ෂ නායකත්වය දැරීමයි. ඔහු 1969 සිට ද්‍රවිඩ මුන්නේර කසාගම් (ද්‍රවිඩ ප්‍රගතිශීලී සම්මේලනය) හි අසහාය නායකයා වූ අතර, වසර 49 ක් තිස්සේ පක්ෂය තරබාරුකමෙන් හා කෙට්ටුවලින් මෙහෙයවීය. ද්‍රවිඩ කුලදෙටුවන් ප්‍රථම වරට 1957 දී ප්‍රාන්ත ව්‍යවස්ථාදායක සභාවට තේරී පත් වූ අතර එතැන් සිට ඔහු පෞද්ගලිකව තරඟ කළ මැතිවරණයකින් කිසි විටෙකත් පරාජයට පත් නොවීය. එවැනි නොබිඳුණු දීර්ඝ වාර්තාවක් ගැන පුරසාරම් දෙඩීමට කිසිදු ඉන්දීය දේශපාලනඥයකුට නොහැකිය. "කලේඤ්ඤර්" මුතුවේල් කරුණානිධි යනු සාමාන්‍ය දේශපාලනිකයෙකු නොව සැබෑ දේශපාලන ආයතනයකි.

මුතුවේල් කරුණානිධි ස්ටාලින් හෙවත් එම්කේ ස්ටාලින් යනු භාර්යාවන් තිදෙනෙකුගෙන් දරුවන් හය දෙනෙකු සිටි මුතුවේල් කරුණානිධිගේ තුන්වන පුත්‍රයාය. කරුණානිධිගේ පළමු බිරිඳ පද්මාවතී සුප්‍රසිද්ධ පසුබිම් ගායකයෙකු සහ සංගීත නිර්මාපකයෙකු වන "චිදම්බරම්" ජයරාමන්ගේ සොහොයුරිය වූවාය. ඇය එම්.කේ. මුතුට දාව පුත්‍රයෙකු බිහි කිරීමෙන් ටික කලකට පසු මිය ගියාය. පද්මාවතීගේ මරණයෙන් පසු කරුණානිධි දයාලු සමඟ විවාහ වූ අතර ඇයගෙන් පුතුන් තිදෙනෙකු සහ දියණියක සිටියේය. පුතුන් අලගිරි, ස්ටාලින් සහ තමිලරසු වන අතර දියණිය සෙල්වි ය. පසු කාලීනව කරුණානිධිට තවත් බිරිඳක් වූ ධර්මාම්බල් හෙවත් රාජතීගේ දියණිය කනිමෝෂිය.

ස්ටාලින් කරුණානිධිගේ සිව්වැනි දරුවා සහ තෙවැනි පුත්‍රයාය. ඔහු උපත ලැබුවේ 1953 මාර්තු 01 වන දින වර්තමානයේ චෙන්නායි ලෙස හඳුන්වන මදුරාසියේ ය. කරුණානිධි තම වැඩිමහල් පුත්‍රයාට මුත්තු ලෙස නම් කර තිබුණේ ඔහුගේ පියා මුතුවෙල්ගේ නමින්. ඔහුගේ දෙවන පුත්‍රයා වන අලගිරි නම් කරන ලද්දේ සුප්‍රසිද්ධ DK ක්‍රියාකාරිකයෙකු වන පත්තුක්කෝට්ටෙයි අලගිරිසාමි විසින් "Anjaanenjan Azhagiri" ලෙසිනි. ඔහුගේ තුන්වන පුත් ස්ටාලින් සම්බන්ධයෙන්. කරුණානිධි ඔහුට මුලින් අයියදුරෙයි යන නම තබා ඇත්තේ ඔහුගේ පියාගේ සීයා වූ අයියදුරෙයිගේ නමින්. කෙසේ වෙතත් දින හතරකට පසු, සෝවියට් සංගමයේ ඒකාධිපති පාලක ජෝසේ ස්ටාලින් 1953 මාර්තු 5 වන දින මිය ගියේය. 1878 දී උපතේදී Ioseb Jughashvil ලෙස නම් කළද, ඔහු 1912 දී එය වානේ මිනිසා යන අර්ථය ඇති Stalin ලෙස වෙනස් කර ඇත. කරුණානිධි ස්ටාලින්ගේ දිගුකාලීන රසිකයෙක් වූ බැවින් කොමියුනිස්ට් ප්‍රබලයාට ගෞරව කිරීම සඳහා ඔහුගේ අලුත උපන් පුතාගේ නම අයියදුරෙයි වෙනුවට ස්ටාලින් ලෙස ලියාපදිංචි කළේය.

ස්ටාලින් ඔහුගේ ප්‍රාථමික හා ද්විතීයික අධ්‍යාපනය ලැබුවේ චෙට්පෙට්හි MCC උසස් ද්විතීයික පාසලේය. ඔහුගේම අවංක පිළිගැනීම අනුව තරුණ ස්ටාලින් අධ්‍යාපනයෙන් හෝ ක්‍රීඩාවෙන් දස්කම් දැක්වූයේ නැත, ඔහු දෙමළ බසින් දක්‍ෂ කථිකයකු ද නොවීය. තවද ඔහුගේ සමහර ගුරුවරුන් ඔහුගේ "කොමියුනිස්ට්" නාමය වන ස්ටාලින්ට හෝ ඔහුගේ පියාගේ ද්‍රවිඩ දේශපාලනයට කැමති වූයේ නැත. කිසිදු හේතුවක් නොමැතිව ස්ටාලින්ගේ ඇඹරුම් ගැසීමේ දෛනික චාරිත්‍රය සිදු කරන එක් ස්වාමියෙක් සිටියේය. ස්ටාලින් විවේකානන්ද විද්‍යාලයෙන් සිය පෙර විශ්වවිද්‍යාල සහතික (PUC) අධ්‍යාපනය සම්පූර්ණ කළේය. ඉන්පසු ඔහු ජනාධිපති විද්‍යාලයට ඇතුළත් වූ අතර ඉතිහාසය පිළිබඳ ශාස්ත්‍රපති උපාධියක් හැදෑරීය. ස්ටාලින් 1973 දී සිය අධ්‍යයන කටයුතු අවසන් නොකර ඉවත් වූ නමුත් වසර තුනකට පසුව මාර්ඩ්‍රාස් විශ්ව විද්‍යාලයේ බාහිර ශිෂ්‍යයෙකු ලෙස උපාධිය ලබා ගත්තේය.

1957 දී ඔහුගේ පියා පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙකු (ව්‍යවස්ථාදායක සභාවේ මන්ත්‍රී) වීමත් සමඟ ස්ටාලින් කුඩා කල සිටම දේශපාලනයට උනන්දු විය. ඔහු ක්‍රියාකාරී දේශපාලනයට පිවිසෙන්නේ 1967 දී වයස අවුරුදු 14 දී ය. කරුණානිධිගේ බෑණනුවන් සහ ස්ටාලින්ගේ ඥාති සොහොයුරා වන "මුරසෝලි" මාරන් මදුරාසියේ දකුණු පාර්ලිමේන්තු ආසනයේ අතුරු මැතිවරණයට තරඟ කළ අතර තරුණ ස්ටාලින් මැතිවරණ ව්‍යාපාරයට සම්බන්ධ විය. වසරකට පසුව 1968 දී 15 හැවිරිදි ස්ටාලින් ගෝපාලපුරම් DMK තරුණ සංවිධානය ආරම්භ කළේය. කරුණානිධිගේ නිවස තිබුණේ ගෝපාලපුරම්වලය. මෙය ඩීඑම්කේ තරුණ අංශයේ පූර්වගාමියා විය. ස්ටාලින් ඩීඑම්කේ තරුණ අංශය සමඟ තමාව හඳුනාගෙන වසර ගණනාවක් පුරා එය ප්‍රබල සංවිධානයක් ලෙස ගොඩනඟා ගත්තේය. ඔහු දශක තුනක පමණ කාලයක් "ඉලයින්ජාර් ආනි" ලෙසින් හැඳින්වූ DMK තරුණ අංශයේ නායකයා විය.. ඔහුගේ තරුණ ගෝලයන් විසින් සලින්ව "තලපති" (සේනාපති) ලෙස හඳුන්වනු ලැබීය. 1973 දී ඔහු DMK මහා සභාවට තේරී පත් විය.

ස්ටාලින්ගේ දේශපාලන බව්තීස්මය වූයේ 1976 දීය. එවකට ඉන්දීය අගමැතිනි ඉන්දිරා ගාන්ධි හදිසි තත්වයක් ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කළ අතර 1975 ජූනි මාසයේදී ඇය මැතිවරණ පෙත්සමක් මගින් අසත්‍ය වූ විට ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදී පාලනය යටපත් කළේය. කරුණානිධි මහ ඇමති ලෙස තමිල්නාඩුවේ පාලනය ඩී.එම්.කේ. හදිසි නීතිය යටතේ 1975 අගෝස්තු 25 වැනි දින ස්ටාලින් විවාහ වූයේ ශාන්ත නමින් හැඳින්වෙන දුර්ගා සමඟ ය. ඉන්දිරා කෝපයට පත් වූ හදිසි නීතියට කරුණානිධි සහ ඔහුගේ ඩීඑම්කේ ආන්ඩුව දැඩි ලෙස විරුද්ධ විය. 1976 ජනවාරි 31 වැනි දින ඉන්දිරා ගාන්ධි විසින් DMK රජය විසුරුවා හැර ජනාධිපති පාලනය ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කරන ලදී. ඩීඑම්කේ ප්‍රබලයින් සහ ක්‍රියාකාරීන් දහස් ගණනක් අත්අඩංගුවට ගෙන අභ්‍යන්තර ආරක්ෂක නඩත්තු පනත (MISA) යටතේ නඩු විභාගයකින් තොරව රඳවා තබා ගන්නා ලදී.

කරුණානිධි අත්අඩංගුවට නොගත්තද, ඔහුගේ අලුත විවාහ වූ දේශපාලනිකව ක්‍රියාකාරී පුත්‍රයා 1976 පෙබරවාරි 1 වැනිදා අත්අඩංගුවට ගෙන MISA යටතේ සිරගත කරන ලදී. පොලිසිය ස්ටාලින් රැගෙන යන විට කරුණානිධි තම පුතාට පැවසුවේ අධෛර්යයට පත් නොවන ලෙසත් ඉන්දිරා ගාන්ධි ස්ටාලින්ගේ දේශපාලන ගමන ඔහුව අත්අඩංගුවට ගැනීමෙන් දියත් කරන බවත්ය. ස්ටාලින් දරුණු තත්ත්‍වයක් මධ්‍යයේ චෙන්නායි හි මධ්‍යම බන්ධනාගාරයේ සිර මැදිරියක රඳවා සිටි අතර ඔහුට කිහිප වතාවක් පහර දෙන ලදී.

එක් අවස්ථාවක ස්ටාලින්ට පොලුවලින් අමානුෂික ලෙස පහර දෙන ලදී. මේ දසුන දරාගත නොහැකිව හිටපු චෙන්නායි නගරාධිපති සහ චෙන්ගල්පත්තු මන්ත්‍රී ඩී.එම්.කේ.සී.චිට්ටිබාබු ස්ටාලින් මතට වැටී පලිහක් එල්ල කළේය. චිට්ටිබාබුට අනුකම්පා විරහිතව පහර දීමෙන් ඔහුට සිහිය නැති වී ඉක්මනින්ම මිය ගියේය. මෙයින් ගුටිබැට හුවමාරුව අවසන් විය. MISA රෙගුලාසි යටතේ ස්ටාලින් මාස 13 ක් රඳවා තබා ගන්නා ලදී. රිදී රේඛාව වූයේ මේ කාලය තුළ ඔහු සිය ශාස්ත්‍රවේදී අධ්‍යාපනය සම්පූර්ණ කිරීමට සමත් වීමයි.

නිදහස ලැබීමෙන් පසු ස්ටාලින් පූර්ණ කාලීන දේශපාලනයට ඇද වැටුණි. ඔහුගේ පියා පුරෝකථනය කළ පරිදි හදිසි නීතිය අතරතුර රඳවා තබා ගැනීම ස්ටාලින්ගේ දේශපාලන ජීවිතයට දියත් කිරීමේ වේදිකාවක් විය. ඔහු 1984 දී චෙන්නායි නගර සීමාව තුළ "ආයිරම් විලක්" (හවුස් ලයිට්) මැතිවරණ කොට්ඨාශයට මුලින්ම තරඟ කළේය. ඔහු පරාජය විය. 1989 දී ඔහු නැවත තරග කර ජයග්‍රහණය කර පළමු වරට මන්ත්‍රීවරයකු විය. 1991 මැතිවරණයෙන් ඔහු නැවතත් පරාජයට පත් විය. 1 996, 2001 සහ 2006 ප්‍රාන්ත මැතිවරණවලදී ඔහු Ayiram Vilakku හි ජයග්‍රහණය කළේය. 2011 දී ස්ටාලින් චෙන්නායි උප නාගරික මැතිවරණ කොට්ඨාශයක් වන කොලතූර් වෙත මාරු වී ජයග්‍රහණය කළේය. ඔහු 2016 දී මෙන්ම 2021 මැතිවරණයේදීත් කොලතූර් රඳවා ගත්තේය.

පෙර පැවති මහ නගර සභා මැතිවරණ ක්‍රමය සංශෝධනය කරන ලද අතර 1996 දී සෘජුවම තේරී පත් වූ නගරාධිපතිවරයෙකු සඳහා ප්‍රතිපාදන සම්පාදනය කරන ලදී. ස්ටාලින් 1996 දී චෙන්නායි (කලින් මදුරාසි) නාගරික සංස්ථා මැතිවරණයට ඉදිරිපත් වූ අතර නගරයේ ප්‍රථම සෘජුවම තේරී පත් වූ නගරාධිපති බවට පත්විය. ඔහු දක්ෂ පරිපාලකයෙකු බව ඔප්පු කළ අතර යටිතල පහසුකම් සංවර්ධන ව්‍යාපෘති ක්‍රියාත්මක කළේය. මාර්ග පුළුල් කිරීම, පානීය ජල සම්පාදනය, විදුලිය, පාසල්, සෞඛ්‍ය සායන සහ ජලාපවහන වැඩිදියුණු කිරීමේ යෝජනා ක්‍රමවලට අමතරව නගරාධිපති ස්ටාලින් විසින් ගුවන් පාලම් නවයක් ද ඉදිකරන ලදී. කසළ ඉවත් කිරීම සහ මාර්ග නඩත්තුව පෞද්ගලීකරණය කිරීම ද විධිමත් කළේය.

කෙසේ වෙතත් නගරාධිපති ස්ටාලින්ගේ සුරතල් ව්‍යාපෘතිය "සිංගාර චෙන්නායි" (ලස්සන චෙන්නායි) ලෙස හැඳින්වෙන නගරය අලංකාර කිරීමේ යෝජනා ක්‍රමයක් විය. මේ සඳහා ඔහුට බොහෝ පැසසුම් ලැබිණි. ඔහු 2001 දී චෙන්නායි නගරාධිපති ලෙස නැවත තේරී පත් විය. 2001 න් පසු තවත් වාරයක් චෙන්නායි හි පළමු පුරවැසියා ලෙස සිටීමට ස්ටාලින් කැමති වුවද, 2002 දී අතීතයේ සිට බලපැවැත්වෙන පරිදි නීති සම්පාදනය කළ ඒඩීඑම්කේ මහ ඇමතිනී ජයලලිතා ජයරාම් විසින් ඔහුව තහනම් කරන ලදී. පුද්ගලයන්ට එකවර නගරාධිපති සහ මන්ත්‍රීවරයා වීම තහනම් කිරීම. ස්ටාලින් නීති සම්පාදකයෙකු වීමට තීරණය කළේය.

ස්ටාලින් ද පක්ෂය තුළ නැගී සිටියේය. ඔහු මුලින්ම 1982 දී DMK තරුණ අංශයේ ලේකම් බවට පත් වූ අතර ඉතා දිගු කාලයක් එම තනතුරේ කටයුතු කළේය. 2003 දී ස්ටාලින් DMK පක්ෂයේ නියෝජ්‍ය මහලේකම් බවට පත් විය. 2008 දී ඔහු DMK පක්ෂයේ භාණ්ඩාගාරික ලෙස තේරී පත් විය. කරුණානිධි මහ ඇමතිවරයා ලෙස 2006 දී DMK පක්ෂය ප්‍රාන්ත රජය පිහිටුවීය. ස්ටාලින් ග්‍රාම සංවර්ධන හා ප්‍රාදේශීය පරිපාලන අමාත්‍යවරයා ලෙස පත් කරන ලදී. 2009 මැයි මාසයේදී කරුණානිධි විසින් නියෝජ්‍ය මහ ඇමති තනතුර නිර්මාණය කර ඔහුගේ පුත්‍රයා "තුනයි මුදලාර්" ලෙස පත් කරන ලදී. 2011 තමිල්නාඩු මැතිවරණයේදී ඩී.එම්.කේ පක්ෂයට විශාල පරාජයක් අත්විය. පක්ෂයට ලැබුණේ ආසන 23ක් පමණක් වන අතර දේශිය මුට්පොක්කු ද්‍රවිඩ කසාගම් (ඩීඑම්ඩීකේ) ආසන 29ක් ලබාගත් නළු විජයකාන්ත්ට විපක්ෂ නායකකම පවා අහිමි කළේය.

පියා පක්ෂ නායකයා ලෙස දිගටම කටයුතු කරන අතරේ, පුතා ඩීඑම්කේ පක්ෂය තුළ ශක්තිමත් වීමට පටන් ගෙන සැබෑ නායකයා බවට පත් විය.ඔහුගේ සෞඛ්‍ය තත්ත්වය පිරිහීමත් සමඟ. කරුණානිධි 2013 ජනවාරි මාසයේදී ස්ටාලින් ඔහුගේ දේශපාලන උරුමක්කාරයා ලෙස නිල වශයෙන් “අභිෂේක” කළේය. විශේෂ රැස්වීමකදී පක්ෂ නිලධාරී මණ්ඩලය අමතමින් කරුණානිධි පැවසුවේ, “මගේ අවසන් හුස්ම වන තුරුම මිනිසුන්ගේ උන්නතිය සහ සංවර්ධනය සඳහා මම කටයුතු කරමි. “මගෙන් පසු කුමක් ද” යන ප්‍රශ්නයට, මෙහි අසුන්ගෙන සිටින ස්ටාලින් පිළිතුර වන අතර ඔබ මෙය අමතක නොකළ යුතුය.

2016 ප්‍රාන්ත මැතිවරණයේදී සාමාන්‍ය නොවන කරුණානිධි දැන් රෝද පුටුවකට සීමා වී මැතිවරණ ප්‍රචාරක ව්‍යාපාරයේදී පිටුපස අසුන් ගත්තේය. ස්ටාලින් විසින් DMK ප්‍රමුඛ සන්ධානයට ආසන 98ක් ලබා ගැනීමට නායකත්වය දුන් අතර එයින් DMK පක්ෂයට ආසන 89ක් හිමි විය. ජයලලිතා ප්‍රමුඛ ඒඩීඑම්කේ පක්ෂය ආසන 136ක් ලබා ගනිමින් නැවත බලයට පත් විය. ස්ටාලින් විපක්ෂ නායක විය. 2016 සැප්තැම්බර් මාසයේදී ජයලලිතා බරපතල ලෙස රෝගාතුර වූ අතර ඕ.එස්. පන්නීර්සෙල්වම් වැඩබලන මහ ඇමති ධුරයට පත් විය. 2016 දෙසැම්බර් මාසයේදී ජයලලිතා මිය ගියාය. එඩප්පාඩි කේ පලනිස්වාමි ඒඅයිඩීඑම්කේ මහ ඇමතිවරයා බවට පත් විය.

2017 ජනවාරි මාසයේදී ස්ටාලින් නිල වශයෙන් පක්ෂ ධූරාවලිය තුළ “සෙයල් තලෙයිවර්” නොහොත් වැඩ කරන ජනාධිපතිවරයා ලෙස උසස් කරන ලදී. ආබාධිත කරුණානිධි නාමික ඩීඑම්එල් සභාපති ලෙස සිටි අතර, පක්ෂය ස්ටාලින්ගේ නායකත්වයට පිටුපසින් සිටින ශ්‍රේණිගත කිරීම් වසා දැමීය. කරුණානිධි 2018 අගෝස්තු මාසයේදී අභාවප්‍රාප්ත වූ අතර ස්ටාලින් DMK පක්ෂයේ සභාපති ලෙස ඒකමතිකව තේරී පත් විය. කරුණානිධිගේ වියෝවෙන් ඇති වූ හිඩැස පිරවීමට ස්ටාලින්ට හැකි වේදැයි සැක පහළ කළ බොහෝ දෙනෙක් සිටියහ. එසේම ස්ටාලින්ව ඔහුගේ කීර්තිමත් පියාට (අසාධාරණ ලෙස) සංසන්දනය කරන ලද අතර ඔහුට අවශ්‍ය නැත.

ඩීඑම්කේ සභාපති ලෙස සිය සමාරම්භක දේශනය පවත්වමින් සිටි ස්ටාලින්, පක්ෂ රැස්වීමක් අමතමින් කරුණානිධි භාවිතා කළ වචන පුනරුච්චාරණය කිරීමෙන් ප්‍රේක්ෂකාගාරය තුළ ප්‍රතිචාරාත්මක ස්වරයක් ඇති කළේය. ස්ටාලින් පැවසුවේ, "එන් උයිරිනුම් මෙලන අන්බු උඩන් පිරපුක්කලේ (මම ජීවිතයට වඩා ආදරය කරන මගේ ආදරණීය සහෝදර සහෝදරියන්)" යනුවෙනි. එවිට ඔහු හැඟීම්බර වූ අතර ඔහු තම පියාට සම්පූර්ණයෙන්ම වෙනස් බව පැවසීය. “මම ඔහු වගේ කතා කරන්න දන්නේ නැහැ, මට ඔහු වගේ කතා කරන්න බැහැ, මට ඔහු වගේ භාෂාව අයිති කරගන්න බැහැ. නමුත් මම ඕනෑම දෙයක් උත්සාහ කිරීමට ධෛර්යයෙන් යුතුව ඔබ ඉදිරියේ පෙනී සිටිමි. පක්ෂයේ ආරම්භක මූලධර්ම හතර ආරක්ෂා කිරීමට, අගය කිරීමට සහ ඉදිරියට ගෙන යාමට ස්ටාලින් ප්‍රතිඥා දුන්නේය. "මෙම පක්ෂය භාවිතා කරමින් තමිල්නාඩුව ආත්ම ගෞරවය, සමානාත්මතාවය, සමාජ සාධාරණත්වය යන මාවතට ගෙන යාම මගේ අරමුණයි" යනුවෙන් ඩීඑම්කේ හි නව සභාපතිවරයා පැවසීය.

ස්ටාලින් ඔහුගේ වචනයට සත්‍ය වූ අතර අන්නදුරෙයි සහ කරුණානිධි විසින් ප්‍රස්ථාරගත කරන ලද මාවත ඔස්සේ ඩී.එම්.කේ පක්ෂය මෙහෙයවීමට උත්සාහ කළේය. ඔහු 2019 ලෝක් සභා මැතිවරණයේදී ඉන්දීය පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ තමිල්නාඩුවට වෙන් කර ඇති ආසන 39න් 38ක් ඩී.එම්.කේ ප්‍රමුඛ සන්ධානය දිනාගත් විට ඔහුගේ ශක්තිය ඔප්පු කළේය. 2021 මැතිවරණයේ දී DMK පක්ෂය ජයග්‍රහණය කරා ගෙන යාමෙන් ස්ටාලින් නැවතත් ඔහුගේ "ජයග්‍රාහීත්වය" ප්‍රදර්ශනය කර ඇත.
මෙම ලිපිය ලියා ඇත්තේ 2022 ජූනි 15 වැනි දින “ඩේලි එෆ්ටී” හි එන “දේශපාලන ස්පන්දනය” තීරුව සඳහාය. එයට මෙතැනින් ප්‍රවේශ විය හැක-

ta.title: தமிழக திமுக முதல்வர் மு.க. ஸ்டாலினும் இலங்கையும்
body_lines: இந்த ஆண்டு மே 19 அன்று, பனாமாவில் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட பொது சரக்குக் கப்பல் "டான் பின் 99" காலை 8.28 மணிக்கு இந்தியாவின் சென்னை துறைமுகத்தில் இருந்து 9000 டன் அரிசி, 200 டன் பால் பவுடர் மற்றும் 24 டன் அத்தியாவசிய மருந்துகளுடன் புறப்பட்டது. அதன் இலக்கு இலங்கையின் கொழும்பு துறைமுகம். இந்தியாவின் தமிழ்நாடு மாநிலத்திலிருந்து அதன் தீவு அண்டை நாடான இலங்கைக்கு தாராளமாக அவசர உதவிப் பொதியின் முதல் சரக்கு இதுவாகும். "Frontline'newsmagazine இல் எழுதிய RK ராதாகிருஷ்ணன், இந்த பரிசை "வளரும் நாட்டில் உள்ள ஒரு மாகாணம் மற்றொரு நாட்டிற்கு உதவி செய்யும் முதல் வகை" என்று விவரித்தார்.

ஃபிரண்ட்லைனில் மேலும் எழுதுகையில், ஆர்.கே.ராதாகிருஷ்ணன் இவ்வாறு குறிப்பிட்டார்- “தீவு தேசத்தின் பொருளாதாரச் சீரழிவைத் தொடர்ந்து மக்கள் படும் இன்னல்களைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு, அரிசி மற்றும் பிற அத்தியாவசியப் பொருட்கள் வடிவில் மனிதாபிமான உதவிகளை இலங்கைக்கு வழங்க தமிழ்நாடு முடிவு செய்தது. கடந்த காலங்களில் இலங்கையில் தனித் தமிழ் நாடு கோரி வந்த தமிழக அரசியல் கட்சிகளின் நிலைப்பாட்டில் இது ஒரு குறிப்பிடத்தக்க மாற்றமாகும். இது இரு பிராந்திய மக்களிடையே மேம்பட்ட தொடர்புக்கு களம் அமைக்கிறது.

தற்போதைய மாற்று விகிதங்களின்படி, ஒரு இந்திய ரூபாய் 4.61 இலங்கை ரூபாய்/சென்ட்களுக்கு சமம். தமிழ்நாட்டிலிருந்து இலங்கைக்கான ஒட்டுமொத்த அவசரகாலப் பரிசாக இந்திய ரூபாய் 1230 மில்லியன் என மதிப்பிடப்பட்டுள்ளது. மொத்த உதவியில் 40,000 டன் அரிசி, 100-க்கும் மேற்பட்ட உயிர்காக்கும் மருந்துகள் மற்றும் 500 டன் பால் பவுடர் ஆகியவை அடங்கும். தமிழ்நாட்டிலிருந்து வந்த முதலாவது சரக்கு இலங்கை ரூபாவின் பெறுமதியில் இரண்டு பில்லியன்களுக்கு மேல் இருந்தது. மே 18ஆம் தேதி தமிழக முதல்வர் மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் சென்னை துறைமுகத்தில் இலங்கைக்கு ஏற்றப்படும் சரக்குகளை கொடியசைத்து தொடங்கி வைத்தார்.

தமிழ்நாட்டு மக்களிடமிருந்து இலங்கை மக்களுக்கான முதல் உதவித்தொகை உரிய நேரத்தில் கொழும்பு துறைமுகத்தை அடைந்து நன்றியுடன் ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளப்பட்டது. இது தீவின் அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களுக்கும் விநியோகிக்கப்பட்டது. மே 4 ஆம் தேதி, அவர் ராஜினாமா செய்வதற்கு ஐந்து நாட்களுக்கு முன்பு, அப்போதைய பிரதமர் மஹிந்த ராஜபக்ஷ, மனிதாபிமான உதவிக்கு நன்றி தெரிவித்து, முதல்வர் ஸ்டாலினுக்கு கடிதம் எழுதினார். “நாட்டின் நெருக்கடியை வேறொரு நாட்டைப் பற்றிய பிரச்சினையாகக் கருதாமல், மனிதாபிமானக் கண்ணோட்டத்தில் பார்த்ததற்காக, இலங்கை மக்கள் சார்பாக உங்களுக்கும், தமிழக அரசுக்கும் நன்றியைத் தெரிவித்துக் கொள்கிறேன்.” கடிதத்தில் மஹிந்த தெரிவித்துள்ளார்.

ஜூன் 4ஆம் தேதி, இந்தியாவிற்கான இலங்கை உயர்ஸ்தானிகர் மிலிந்த மொரகொடா, தமிழக முதல்வர் மு.க.ஸ்டாலினை நேரில் சந்தித்துப் பேசினார். இந்தியாவுக்கான இலங்கைத் தூதுவர் கடைசியாக 2011ஆம் ஆண்டு சென்னையில் தமிழக முதல்வரைச் சந்தித்தார். ஸ்டாலின் - மொரகொடா சந்திப்பு குறித்து மூத்த இந்திய ஊடகவியலாளர் பி.கே.பாலச்சந்திரன் “NewsIn.Asia” வில் பின்வருமாறு எழுதுகிறார்.

"தற்போதைய பொருளாதார நெருக்கடியை சமாளிக்க உதவுவதற்காக இலங்கைக்கு சமீபத்தில் வழங்கிய 2 பில்லியன் ரூபாய் மதிப்பிலான மனிதாபிமான உதவிகளுக்கு உயர் ஸ்தானிகர் முதலமைச்சர் மற்றும் தமிழக மக்களுக்கு நன்றி தெரிவித்தார். இலங்கையின் நிலைமை குறித்தும், அத்தியாவசியப் பொருட்களின் முதல் ஏற்றுமதியை உடனடியாக அனுப்புவதற்கான ஏற்பாடுகளைச் செய்திருந்தது. இரண்டாவது ஏற்றுமதியும் அனுப்பப்பட உள்ளதாகவும் மேலும் சில ஏற்றுமதிகள் எதிர்பார்க்கப்படுவதாகவும் அவர் கூறினார்.

“உயர் ஸ்தானிகரும், முதலமைச்சரும் இலங்கைக்கும் தமிழகத்துக்கும் இடையிலான உறவு, மீனவர் பிரச்சினை உட்பட பல பகுதிகள் குறித்து விவாதித்தனர். இரண்டு உயரதிகாரிகளும் தமிழ்நாட்டுக்கும் இலங்கைக்கும் இடையிலான பழமையான மற்றும் வலுவான இன, கலாச்சார மற்றும் மத தொடர்புகளை மதிப்பாய்வு செய்து அவற்றை மேலும் வலுப்படுத்துவதற்கான வழிகள் குறித்து விவாதித்தனர்.

இதுகுறித்து, முதல்வர் ஸ்டாலின், இலங்கையில் புகழ்பெற்ற தமிழ்க் கவிஞரும் தத்துவஞானியுமான திருவள்ளுவரின் சிலையை இலங்கையில் பல்கலைக்கழகம் போன்ற பொருத்தமான வளாகத்தில் நிறுவ வேண்டும் என்று கோரிக்கை விடுத்தார். உயர் ஸ்தானிகர் இந்த ஆலோசனையை வரவேற்று, இந்த முயற்சியை ஆதரித்து எளிதாக்கினார்.

“இலங்கைக்கும் தமிழ்நாடு மாநிலத்துக்கும் இடையிலான உறவின் அனைத்து அம்சங்களிலும் சிறந்த ஒருங்கிணைப்பைக் கொண்டிருக்கும் நோக்கில், உயர்ஸ்தானிகர் மொரகொட, மாநில மட்டத்தில் ஒரு மையப் புள்ளியை நியமிக்குமாறு முதலமைச்சரிடம் கோரிக்கை விடுத்தார். முதலமைச்சர் ஸ்டாலினையும் இலங்கைக்கு வருமாறு உயர்ஸ்தானிகர் அழைப்பு விடுத்துள்ளார்”

இந்தியாவின் தமிழ்நாடு மாநிலத்திற்கும் இலங்கைக்கும் இடையிலான உறவில் ஏற்பட்டுள்ள மாற்றத்தின் புத்துணர்ச்சியூட்டும் அடையாளங்கள் மிகவும் வரவேற்கத்தக்க அம்சமாகும், இருப்பினும் இது சம்பந்தமாக எதிர்காலத்தை மதிப்பிடுவதற்கு இது மிக விரைவில். 72 மில்லியன் மக்கள்தொகை கொண்ட இந்திய மாநிலம் இலங்கைக்கு மிக அருகில் உள்ளது. தமிழ்நாடு மற்றும் இலங்கை இரண்டும் வரலாற்று ரீதியாகவும் புவியியல் ரீதியாகவும் ஒன்றோடொன்று பின்னிப் பிணைந்துள்ளன. திராவிட மொழியான தமிழ் தமிழ் நாட்டில் பேசப்படும் முதன்மை மொழியாகும், அதாவது தமிழர்களின் நிலம் அல்லது நாடு. இலங்கையின் சனத்தொகையில் 25% க்கும் அதிகமானோர் தமிழ் பேசும் மக்கள் என வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளனர். வெவ்வேறு இனங்களைச் சேர்ந்த கணிசமான எண்ணிக்கையிலான இலங்கையர்கள் தென்னிந்திய மாநிலங்களான தமிழ்நாடு மற்றும் கேரளாவில் இருந்து தீவுக்கு குடிபெயர்ந்த மக்களின் வழித்தோன்றல்கள்.
திமுக நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்கள் தங்களின் ஒரு மாத சம்பளத்தை இலங்கையின் உதவிக்கு வழங்குவார்கள்

சமீப காலங்களில், தமிழ்நாட்டின் அரசியல் முன்னேற்றங்கள் இலங்கையிலும் அதற்கு நேர்மாறாகவும் அதிக தாக்கத்தை ஏற்படுத்தியுள்ளன. எனவே தமிழக முதல்வரின் அரசியல் நடத்தை இலங்கைக்கு மிகவும் இணக்கமானதாகவும் முக்கியத்துவம் வாய்ந்ததாகவும் உள்ளது. அந்தச் சூழலில் இலங்கைக்கு மனிதாபிமான உதவிகளை வழங்குவதில் தாவீதா முன்னேற்றக் கழகத்தின் (திமுக) முதல்வர் ஸ்டாலின் எடுத்துள்ள முயற்சி மிகவும் பாராட்டத்தக்கது. ஆக்கப்பூர்வமாகப் பயன்படுத்தினால், அது தீவு தேசத்திற்கும் தென்னிந்திய மாநிலத்திற்கும் இடையே நேர்மறையான இயல்புடைய உறவுகளை மாற்றுவதற்கான முன்னோடியாக இருக்கலாம். அவ்வாறானதொரு உறவுமுறை உருவாகுமானால், அது ஒன்றுக்கு மேற்பட்ட வழிகளில் இலங்கை மக்களுக்குப் பெரிதும் பயனளிக்கும்.

இதுபோன்ற உறவு கடந்த காலத்தில் கற்பனை செய்ய முடியாததாக இருந்திருக்கலாம், ஆனால் எதிர்காலத்தில் அது சாத்தியமாகும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். கடந்த ஆண்டு மே மாதம் திமுக தேர்தல் வெற்றியும், ஸ்டாலின் முதல்வராக பதவியேற்றதும் தமிழகத்திற்கு ஒரு தரமான வேறுபாட்டை ஏற்படுத்தியதாக தெரிகிறது. நடைமுறைச் செயல்திறனுள்ள முதலமைச்சர் கடந்த ஆண்டில் சுமூகமான திறமையான நிர்வாகத்தை நடத்தியதற்காக அதிகப் புகழைப் பெற்றுள்ளார். இந்தப் பின்னணியில், இந்தப் பத்தியில், இலங்கைக் கண்ணோட்டத்தில், தமிழக முதல்வர் ஸ்டாலினைப் பற்றி இரண்டு பகுதி கட்டுரையில் கவனம் செலுத்துகிறது. ஸ்டாலினின் கட்சியான திமுக மற்றும் அதன் முன்னாள் தலைவர் கருணாநிதி, அவரது தந்தையைப் பற்றிய சுருக்கமான குறிப்புடன் ஆரம்பிக்கிறேன்.

"கலைஞர்" (கலைஞர்) என்று தமிழ் பேசும் உலகம் அறியும் முத்துவேல் கருணாநிதி 7 ஆகஸ்ட் 2018 அன்று சென்னையில் தனது 94வது வயதில் காலமானார். கருணாநிதி பல்துறை, பன்முக ஆளுமை. அவரது நிகழ்வுகள் நிறைந்த வாழ்க்கையில் “கலைஞர்” ஒரு பத்திரிகையாளர், ஆசிரியர், நாடக ஆசிரியர், மேடை நடிகர், திரைப்பட வசனகர்த்தா, சிறுகதை எழுத்தாளர், நாவலாசிரியர், இலக்கிய விமர்சகர், கவிஞர், பாடலாசிரியர், திரைப்பட தயாரிப்பாளர் மற்றும் தொலைக்காட்சி சேனல் உரிமையாளர். கருணாநிதி 64 படங்களுக்கு திரைக்கதை, வசனம் எழுதியுள்ளார். மேலும் 11 படங்களுக்கு வசனம் இல்லாமல் கதையோ அல்லது திரைக்கதையோ எழுதியுள்ளார்.

கருணாநிதியின் திரையுலகப் பிரவேசம்தான் அவருக்கு உயர்நிலைக் கல்வி இல்லாவிட்டாலும் ஆரம்பகால வாழ்க்கையில் அவருக்கு அதிக அங்கீகாரத்தையும் அதிக ஊதியத்தையும் பெற்றுத் தந்தது. சினிமாவில் அவரது எழுச்சி ஒரு அரசியல்வாதியாகவும் தனக்கென ஒரு பெயரை செதுக்க பெரிதும் உதவியது. . "கலைஞர்" கருணாநிதியின் அரசியலில் ஏறக்குறைய தமிழகத்தில் திமுகவின் எழுச்சியுடன் ஒத்துப்போகிறது.

இந்தியாவின் தமிழ்நாடு மாநிலத்தின் முதலமைச்சராக கருணாநிதி மொத்தம் 19 ஆண்டுகள் பணியாற்றினார். 1969-71, 1971-76, 1989-91, 1996-2001 மற்றும் 2006-11 என ஐந்து முறை தமிழக முதல்வராக இருந்தார். வேறு எந்த தமிழக முதல்வரும் இவ்வளவு காலம் பதவியில் இருந்ததில்லை. கிட்டத்தட்ட 50 ஆண்டுகள் கட்சித் தலைவராக இருப்பது மற்றொரு சாதனை. 1969 ஆம் ஆண்டு முதல் திராவிட முன்னேற்றக் கழகத்தின் (திராவிட முன்னேற்றக் கூட்டமைப்பு) நிகரற்ற தலைவராக இருந்த அவர், 49 ஆண்டுகளாக கட்சியை தடித்த மற்றும் மெலிதாக வழிநடத்தினார். திராவிடப் பேரறிஞர் 1957 இல் முதன்முதலில் மாநில சட்டமன்றத்திற்குத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார், அதன்பிறகு அவர் தனிப்பட்ட முறையில் போட்டியிட்ட ஒரு தேர்தலில் தோல்வியடையவில்லை. எந்த ஒரு இந்திய அரசியல்வாதியும் இத்தகைய உடைக்கப்படாத நீண்ட சாதனையைப் பற்றி பெருமை கொள்ள முடியாது. “கலைஞர்” முத்துவேல் கருணாநிதி ஒரு சாதாரண அரசியல் வாதி அல்ல, உண்மையான அரசியல் நிறுவனம்.

முத்துவேல் கருணாநிதி ஸ்டாலின் அல்லது மு.க.ஸ்டாலின் மூன்று மனைவிகளில் ஆறு குழந்தைகளைப் பெற்ற முத்துவேல் கருணாநிதியின் மூன்றாவது மகன். கருணாநிதியின் முதல் மனைவி பத்மாவதி, பிரபல பின்னணிப் பாடகரும் இசையமைப்பாளருமான "சிதம்பரம்" ஜெயராமனின் சகோதரி ஆவார். இவர் எம்.கே.முத்து என்ற மகனைப் பெற்ற சிறிது நேரத்திலேயே இறந்தார். பத்மாவதியின் மறைவுக்குப் பிறகு கருணாநிதி தயாளு என்பவரை மணந்து அவருக்கு மூன்று மகன்கள் மற்றும் ஒரு மகள் பிறந்தார். மகன்கள் அழகிரி, ஸ்டாலின், தமிழரசு, மகள் செல்வி. பின்னாளில் கருணாநிதிக்கு ராஜாத்தி என்கிற தர்மாம்பாள் என்ற மனைவியும், அவருடைய மகள் கனிமொழியும் இருந்தார்.

கருணாநிதியின் நான்காவது குழந்தை மற்றும் மூன்றாவது மகன் ஸ்டாலின். அவர் மார்ச் 1, 1953 அன்று சென்னை என்று அழைக்கப்படும் மெட்ராஸில் பிறந்தார். கருணாநிதி தனது மூத்த மகனுக்கு தந்தை முத்துவேலின் பெயரை முத்து என்று பெயரிட்டுள்ளார். அவரது இரண்டாவது மகன் அழகிரிக்கு "அஞ்சாநெஞ்சன் அழகிரி" என்று அழைக்கப்படும் நன்கு அறியப்பட்ட DK ஆர்வலர் பட்டுக்கோட்டை அழகிரிசாமியின் பெயர் சூட்டப்பட்டது. அவரது மூன்றாவது மகன் ஸ்டாலின் விஷயத்தில். கருணாநிதி அவருக்கு முதலில் தனது தந்தை வழி தாத்தா ஐயாதுரையின் நினைவாக ஐயாதுரை என்று பெயரிட்டார். இருப்பினும் நான்கு நாட்களுக்குப் பிறகு, சோவியத் யூனியனின் சர்வாதிகார ஆட்சியாளர் ஜோஸ் ஸ்டாலின் மார்ச் 5, 1953 இல் இறந்தார். 1878 இல் பிறந்தபோது ஐயோசெப் ஜுகாஷ்வில் என்று பெயரிடப்பட்டாலும், 1912 இல் அதை ஸ்டாலின் என்று மாற்றினார். ஸ்டாலினின் நெடுந்தொலைவு அபிமானியான கருணாநிதி, கம்யூனிஸ்ட் தலைவரை கவுரவிக்கும் வகையில் பிறந்த மகனின் பெயரை ஐயாதுரை என்பதற்குப் பதிலாக ஸ்டாலின் எனப் பதிவு செய்தார்.

ஸ்டாலின் தனது ஆரம்ப மற்றும் இடைநிலைக் கல்வியை சேத்துப்பட்டில் உள்ள எம்சிசி மேல்நிலைப் பள்ளியில் பயின்றார். தனது சொந்த வெளிப்படையான ஒப்புதலின்படி, இளம் ஸ்டாலின் படிப்பில் பிரகாசிக்கவில்லை அல்லது விளையாட்டில் சிறந்து விளங்கவில்லை, அவர் தமிழில் ஒரு திறமையான பேச்சாளராக கூட இல்லை. மேலும் அவரது ஆசிரியர்களில் சிலருக்கு அவரது "கம்யூனிஸ்ட்" பெயர் ஸ்டாலினையோ அல்லது அவரது தந்தையின் திராவிட அரசியலையோ பிடிக்கவில்லை. எந்த ஒரு காரணமும் இல்லாமல் ஸ்டாலினின் முட்டியை ராப் செய்யும் தினசரி சடங்கை கடைப்பிடிக்கும் ஒரு மாஸ்டர் இருந்தார். ஸ்டாலின் விவேகானந்தா கல்லூரியில் பல்கலைக்கழகத்திற்கு முந்தைய சான்றிதழ் (PUC) படிப்பை முடித்தார். அதன் பிறகு அவர் பிரசிடென்சி கல்லூரியில் சேர்ந்தார் மற்றும் வரலாற்றில் பிஏ பட்டப்படிப்பைப் படித்தார். ஸ்டாலின் 1973 இல் தனது படிப்பை முடிக்காமல் விட்டுவிட்டார், ஆனால் மூன்று ஆண்டுகளுக்குப் பிறகு மார்ட்ராஸ் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் வெளி மாணவராகப் பட்டம் பெற்றார்.

1957ல் அவரது தந்தை எம்எல்ஏ (சட்டமன்ற உறுப்பினர்) ஆனதால், ஸ்டாலினுக்கு சிறுவயதிலிருந்தே அரசியலில் ஆர்வம் ஏற்பட்டது. 1967 ஆம் ஆண்டு தனது 14வது வயதில் தீவிர அரசியலில் நுழைந்தார். கருணாநிதியின் மருமகனும் ஸ்டாலினின் உறவினருமான "முரசொலி" மாறன் சென்னை தெற்கு நாடாளுமன்றத் தொகுதி இடைத்தேர்தலில் போட்டியிட்டார், மேலும் இளைஞர் ஸ்டாலின் தேர்தல் பிரச்சாரத்தில் ஈடுபட்டார். ஒரு வருடம் கழித்து 1968ல் 15 வயது ஸ்டாலின் கோபாலபுரம் திமுக இளைஞர் அமைப்பை தொடங்கினார். கோபாலபுரத்தில் கருணாநிதி இல்லம் இருந்தது. இது திமுகவின் இளைஞர் அணிக்கு முன்னோடியாக அமைந்தது. திமுக இளைஞரணியில் தன்னை அடையாளப்படுத்திய ஸ்டாலின், பல ஆண்டுகளாக அதை ஒரு வலிமையான அமைப்பாக உருவாக்கினார். அவர் சுமார் மூன்று தசாப்தங்களாக "இளைஞர் அணி" என்று அழைக்கப்படும் திமுக இளைஞரணியின் தலைவராக இருந்தார்.. சலின் தனது இளமை சீடர்களால் "தளபதி" (தளபதி) என்று அழைக்கப்பட்டார். 1973 இல் அவர் திமுக பொதுக்குழுவிற்கு தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார்.

1976ல் ஸ்டாலினின் அரசியல் ஞானஸ்நானம். கருணாநிதி முதலமைச்சராக இருந்த நிலையில் தமிழகத்தில் திமுக ஆட்சியை பிடித்தது. 1975 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஆகஸ்ட் 25 ஆம் தேதி அவசரகால ஆட்சியின் போது சாந்தா என்ற துர்காவை ஸ்டாலின் திருமணம் செய்து கொண்டார். கருணாநிதியும் அவரது திமுக அரசும் இந்திராவை கோபப்படுத்திய அவசரநிலையை கடுமையாக எதிர்த்தனர். ஜனவரி 31, 1976 அன்று, இந்திரா காந்தி திமுக ஆட்சியை டிஸ்மிஸ் செய்து ஜனாதிபதி ஆட்சியை அறிவித்தார். ஆயிரக்கணக்கான திமுக பிரமுகர்கள் மற்றும் தொண்டர்கள் உள்நாட்டுப் பாதுகாப்புச் சட்டத்தின் (மிசா) கீழ் விசாரணையின்றி கைது செய்யப்பட்டு காவலில் வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளனர்.

கருணாநிதி கைது செய்யப்படாவிட்டாலும், புதிதாகத் திருமணம் செய்துகொண்ட அவரது மகன், 1976ம் ஆண்டு பிப்ரவரி 1ம் தேதி கைது செய்யப்பட்டு, மிசா சட்டத்தின் கீழ் சிறையில் அடைக்கப்பட்டார். காவல்துறை ஸ்டாலினை அழைத்துச் செல்லும் போது, ​​கருணாநிதி தன் மகனிடம் மனம் தளர வேண்டாம் என்றும், இந்திரா காந்தி ஸ்டாலினைக் கைது செய்வதன் மூலம் ஸ்டாலினின் அரசியல் வாழ்க்கையைத் தொடங்குகிறார் என்றும் கூறினார். ஸ்டாலின், சென்னை மத்திய சிறையில், பயங்கரமான சூழ்நிலையில் சிறையில் அடைக்கப்பட்டார்.அவர் பலமுறை தாக்கப்பட்டார்.

ஒரு சந்தர்ப்பத்தில் ஸ்டாலின் சரமாரியாக கம்பியால் தாக்கப்பட்டார். இந்த காட்சியை பொறுக்க முடியாமல் சென்னை முன்னாள் மேயரும், செங்கல்பட்டு எம்.பி.யுமான திமுக சி.சிட்டிபாபு ஸ்டாலின் மேல் விழுந்து கேடயம் செய்தார். சிட்டிபாபு இரக்கமின்றி தாக்கப்பட்டதால், அவர் சுயநினைவை இழந்து, விரைவில் உயிரிழந்தார். இதனால் அடிதடி முடிவுக்கு வந்தது. மிசா சட்டத்தின் கீழ் ஸ்டாலின் 13 மாதங்கள் காவலில் வைக்கப்பட்டார். இந்த நேரத்தில் அவர் தனது பி.ஏ படிப்பை முடித்தார் என்பது வெள்ளி கோடு.

விடுதலையான பிறகு ஸ்டாலின் முழு நேர அரசியலில் இறங்கினார். ஸ்டாலினின் அரசியல் வாழ்க்கைக்கு அவசரகாலச் சட்டத்தின் போது அவரது தந்தை முன்னறிவித்திருப்பது உண்மையில் ஒரு தொடக்கப் பாதை. அவர் முதலில் 1984 ஆம் ஆண்டு சென்னை நகர எல்லைக்குட்பட்ட "ஆயிரம் விளக்கு" (ஹவுஸ் லைட்) தொகுதியில் போட்டியிட்டு தோல்வியடைந்தார். 1989ல் மீண்டும் போட்டியிட்டு வெற்றி பெற்று முதல் முறையாக எம்எல்ஏ ஆனார். 1991 தேர்தலில் மீண்டும் தோல்வியடைந்தார். அவர் 1 996, 2001 மற்றும் 2006 மாநில தேர்தல்களில் ஆயிரம் விளக்குகளில் வெற்றி பெற்றார். 2011-ல் சென்னை புறநகர் தொகுதியான கொளத்தூருக்கு மாறினார் ஸ்டாலின். 2016 மற்றும் 2021 தேர்தலிலும் கொளத்தூரைத் தக்க வைத்துக் கொண்டார்.

முந்தைய முனிசிபல் தேர்தல் முறை திருத்தப்பட்டு, 1996ல் நேரடியாகத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்ட மேயருக்கான ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்பட்டது. ஸ்டாலின் 1996ல் சென்னை (முன்னாள் மெட்ராஸ்) மாநகராட்சித் தேர்தலில் போட்டியிட்டு, நகரின் முதல் நேரடியாகத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்ட மேயரானார். அவர் ஒரு திறமையான நிர்வாகி என்பதை நிரூபித்தார் மற்றும் உள்கட்டமைப்பு மேம்பாட்டு திட்டங்களை செயல்படுத்தினார். சாலை விரிவாக்கம், குடிநீர் விநியோகம், மின்மயமாக்கல், பள்ளிகள், மருத்துவ மனைகள் மற்றும் வடிகால் மேம்பாடு ஆகிய திட்டங்களைத் தவிர, மேயர் ஸ்டாலின் 9 மேம்பாலப் பாலங்களையும் கட்டினார். குப்பை அகற்றுதல் மற்றும் சாலைப் பராமரிப்பை தனியாரிடம் ஒப்படைத்து முறைப்படுத்தினார்.

மேயர் ஸ்டாலினின் செல்லப்பிள்ளை திட்டமானது "சிங்கார சென்னை" (அழகான சென்னை) என்று அழைக்கப்படும் நகரத்தை அழகுபடுத்தும் திட்டமாகும். இதற்காக அவருக்கு ஏராளமான பாராட்டுகள் கிடைத்தன. 2001-ம் ஆண்டு சென்னை மேயராக மீண்டும் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார். 2001-க்குப் பிறகு சென்னையின் முதல் குடிமகனாக ஸ்டாலின் தொடர விரும்பினாலும், 2002-ம் ஆண்டு பிற்போக்கான சட்டத்தை இயற்றிய அதிமுக முதல்வர் ஜெயலலிதா ஜெயராம் அவர்களால் தடை செய்யப்பட்டார். ஒரே நேரத்தில் மேயராகவும், எம்எல்ஏவாகவும் இருக்க தடை ஸ்டாலின் சட்டமன்ற உறுப்பினராக விருப்பம் தெரிவித்தார்.

கட்சிக்குள் ஸ்டாலினும் உயர்ந்தார். 1982-ல் திமுக இளைஞரணிச் செயலாளராகப் பொறுப்பேற்ற அவர், நீண்ட காலம் அந்தப் பொறுப்பில் இருந்தார். 2003-ல் திமுகவின் துணைப் பொதுச் செயலாளராக ஸ்டாலின் பொறுப்பேற்றார். 2008ல் திமுக பொருளாளராக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார். 2006 ஆம் ஆண்டு கருணாநிதியை முதல்வராக கொண்டு திமுக ஆட்சி அமைத்தது. ஸ்டாலின் ஊரக வளர்ச்சி மற்றும் உள்ளூர் நிர்வாக அமைச்சராக நியமிக்கப்பட்டார். மே 2009 இல், கருணாநிதி துணை முதல்வர் பதவியை உருவாக்கி, தனது மகனை "துணை முதல்வராக" நியமித்தார். 2011 தமிழகத் தேர்தலில் திமுக பெரும் தோல்வியைச் சந்தித்தது. அக்கட்சிக்கு 23 இடங்கள் மட்டுமே கிடைத்து, 29 இடங்களைப் பெற்ற தேசிய முற்போக்கு திராவிடக் கழகம் (தேமுதிக) நடிகர் விஜயகாந்துக்கு எதிர்க்கட்சித் தலைவர் பதவியையும் பறிகொடுத்தது.

தந்தை தொடர்ந்து கட்சித் தலைவராக இருந்தபோது, ​​மகன் திமுகவுக்குள் தன்னை வலுப்படுத்திக் கொண்டு உண்மையான தலைவராக ஆனார். உடல்நிலை மோசமடைந்ததால். ஸ்டாலினை தனது அரசியல் வாரிசாக 2013 ஜனவரியில் கருணாநிதி முறைப்படி "அபிஷேகம்" செய்தார். சிறப்புக் கூட்டத்தில் கட்சி நிர்வாகிகளிடம் கருணாநிதி பேசுகையில், "எனது இறுதி மூச்சு வரை மக்களின் முன்னேற்றத்திற்காகவும், முன்னேற்றத்திற்காகவும் பாடுபடுவேன். 'எனக்குப் பிறகு என்ன' என்ற கேள்விக்கு, இங்கே அமர்ந்திருக்கும் ஸ்டாலின்தான் பதில், இதை மறந்துவிடக் கூடாது.

2016 ஆம் ஆண்டு மாநிலத் தேர்தல்கள், இப்போது சக்கர நாற்காலியில் மட்டுப்படுத்தப்பட்ட நாகரீகமற்ற கருணாநிதி, தேர்தல் பிரச்சாரத்தின் போது பின் இருக்கையில் அமர்ந்தார். ஸ்டாலின் தலைமையில் திமுக தலைமையிலான கூட்டணி 98 இடங்களைப் பெற்று அதில் திமுக 89 இடங்களைப் பெற்றது. ஜெயலலிதா தலைமையிலான அதிமுக 136 இடங்களைப் பெற்று மீண்டும் ஆட்சியைப் பிடித்தது. ஸ்டாலின் எதிர்க்கட்சித் தலைவரானார். 2016 செப்டம்பரில் ஜெயலலிதாவுக்கு உடல் நலக்குறைவு ஏற்பட்டு, ஓ.எஸ்.பன்னீர்செல்வம் முதல்வராக பதவியேற்றார். 2016 டிசம்பரில் ஜெயலலிதா காலமானார். அதிமுக முதல்வராக எடப்பாடி பழனிசாமி பதவியேற்றார்.

ஜனவரி 2017 இல், ஸ்டாலின் முறைப்படி கட்சியின் படிநிலையில் "செயல் தலைவர்" அல்லது செயல் தலைவராக உயர்த்தப்பட்டார். உடல்நிலை சரியில்லாத கருணாநிதி பெயரளவுக்கு DML தலைவராக இருந்தபோது, ​​​​கட்சி ஸ்டாலினின் தலைமைக்கு பின்னால் அணிவகுத்தது. ஆகஸ்ட் 2018 இல் கருணாநிதி காலமானார், திமுக தலைவராக ஸ்டாலின் ஒருமனதாக தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டார். கருணாநிதியின் மறைவால் ஏற்பட்ட வெற்றிடத்தை ஸ்டாலினால் நிரப்ப முடியுமா என்ற சந்தேகம் பலருக்கு இருந்தது. மேலும் ஸ்டாலினை அவரது புகழ்பெற்ற தந்தையுடன் (நியாயமற்ற முறையில்) ஒப்பிட்டு, தேவையற்றவராக காணப்பட்டார்.

திமுக தலைவராகப் பதவியேற்பு உரையை ஆற்றிய ஸ்டாலின், கட்சிக் கூட்டத்தில் கருணாநிதி பேசிய வார்த்தைகளைத் திரும்பத் திரும்பச் சொல்லி பார்வையாளர்களுக்குள் பதிலடி கொடுத்தார். என் உயிரும் மேலான அன்பு உடன்பிறப்புகளே (உயிரிலும் மேலாக நேசிக்கும் என் அன்பு உடன்பிறப்புகளே) என ஸ்டாலின் கூறியுள்ளார். பின்னர் அவர் உணர்ச்சிவசப்பட்டு, அவர் தனது தந்தையைப் போல் முற்றிலும் மாறுபட்டவர் என்று கூறினார். "எனக்கு அவரைப் போல பேசத் தெரியாது, அவரைப் போல என்னால் பேச முடியாது, அவரைப் போல் என்னால் மொழியைச் சொந்தமாக்க முடியாது. ஆனால் எதையும் முயற்சி செய்யும் துணிவுடன் உங்கள் முன் நிற்கிறேன். கட்சியின் நான்கு அடிப்படைக் கொள்கைகளைப் பாதுகாப்போம், போற்றுவோம், முன்னெடுப்போம் என்று ஸ்டாலின் உறுதியளித்தார். இக்கட்சியைப் பயன்படுத்தி தமிழகத்தை சுயமரியாதை, சமத்துவம், சமூக நீதிப் பாதையில் இட்டுச் செல்வதே எனது லட்சியம் என திமுகவின் புதிய தலைவர் திரு.

ஸ்டாலின் தனது வார்த்தைக்கு உண்மையாக இருந்து, அண்ணாதுரை மற்றும் கருணாநிதியின் வழியில் திமுகவை வழிநடத்த பாடுபட்டார். 2019 மக்களவைத் தேர்தலில் இந்திய நாடாளுமன்றத்தில் தமிழகத்திற்கு ஒதுக்கப்பட்ட 39 இடங்களில் திமுக தலைமையிலான கூட்டணி 38 இடங்களை வென்றபோது அவர் தனது திறமையை நிரூபித்தார். 2021 தேர்தலில் திமுகவை வெற்றிப் பாதைக்கு அழைத்துச் சென்றதன் மூலம் ஸ்டாலின் தனது வெற்றியை மீண்டும் நிரூபித்துள்ளார்.
இந்தக் கட்டுரை ஜூன் 15, 2022 இன் “டெய்லி எஃப்டி”யில் வரும் “அரசியல் துடிப்பு” நெடுவரிசைக்காக எழுதப்பட்டது. அதை இங்கே அணுகலாம்-

en.title: Tamil Nadu’s DMK  Chief Minister M.K.  Stalin and Sri Lanka
body_lines: On  May 19 this year, the Panama-registered general cargo vessel “Tan Binh 99”  departed  at 8.28 am from the Chennai harbour in  India with 9000 tons of rice, 200 tons of milk poweder nd 24 tons of essential medicines. Its destination was  Sri Lanka’s Colombo port. This was the first consignment of  a generous  emergency aid package from the Tamil Nadu state of India to  its Island neighbour Sri Lanka. Writing in the “Frontline’newsmagazine, RK Radhakrishnan described  the gift as a “first of sorts where a  province in a developing country  was extending its assistance to another country”.

Writing further in Frontline,  RK Radhakrishnan observed thus- “Tamil Nadu decided to extend humanitarian assistance to Sri Lanka in the form of rice and other essential commodities, taking into consideration the plight of the people following the economic deterioration of the island nation. This is a marked shift in the stand of political parties in Tamil Nadu, which have in the past demanded a separate Tamil nation in Sri Lanka. It also sets the stage for enhanced interaction between the people of the two regions.”

According to current exchange rates , an Indian rupee equals 4.61 Sri Lankan rupees/cents. The  overall emergency gift to Sri Lanka from Tamil Nadu is estimated at   1230 million  Indian rupees. The total aid  consists of 40,000 tons of rice, 100-plus life-saving drugs and 500 tons of milk powder.   The first consignment from  Tamil Nadu amounted to over Two Billion Sri Lankan rupees in value. On May 18th Tamil Nadu chief minister MK Stalin was at the Chennai  port to flag off the loading  of cargo destined to Sri Lanka.

The first consignment of  aid from the people of Tamil Nadu to the people of Sri Lanka  reached the Colombo dock in due coutse and was  gratefully received.It was distributed to all districts in  the Island. On May 4th,  just  five days before his resignation, the then Prime Minister Mahinda Rajapaksa wrote to chief minister  Stalin, thanking him for the humanitarian assistance. “I wish to thank you and the Tamil Nadu government on behalf of the people of Sri Lanka, for viewing the country’s crisis from a humanitarian standpoint, rather than as a problem concerning another country.” Stated Mahinda in the letter .

On June 4th, Sri Lanka’s high commissioner to India, Milinda Moragoda paid a courtesy call on  Tamil  Nadu chief minister MK Stalin. The last time aa Sri Lankan envoy to India had met a Tamil Nadu chief minister  in Chennai was way back in 2011. Veteran Indian journalist PK Balachandran writes as follows in “NewsIn.Asia” about the  Stalin-Moragoda meeting-

“The High Commissioner thanked the Chief Minister and the people of Tamil Nadu for the humanitarian assistance worth of LKR two billion that they recently extended to Sri Lanka to help it manage the current economic crisis.In response, the Chief Minister observed that he was concerned about the situation in Sri Lanka and had made arrangements to immediately dispatch the first shipment of essential commodities. He added that a second shipment is also in line to be dispatched and that a few more shipments are expected.”

“The High Commissioner and the Chief Minister discussed an array of areas pertaining to the relationship between Sri Lanka and the State of Tamil Nadu, including the fishermen’s issue. The two dignitaries reviewed the ancient and strong ethnic, cultural and religious affinities between Tamil Nadu and Sri Lanka and discussed the ways to further strengthen them.”

“In this regard, Chief Minister Stalin requested Sri Lanka to install a statue of the celebrated Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar in a suitable premise in Sri Lanka, such as a university. The High Commissioner welcomed the suggestion and undertook to support and facilitate this initiative.”

“With a view to having a better coordination on all aspects of the relationship between Sri Lanka and the State of Tamil Nadu, High Commissioner Moragoda requested the Chief Minister to designate a focal point at state level. The High Commissioner invited Chief Minister Stalin to visit Sri Lanka as well”

The refreshing  signs of change in the relationship between India’s Tamil Nadu state and Sri Lanka is a very welcome feature although iit is perhaps too early to  gauge the future in this regard.India is our closest neighbour and within India ,the southern state of Tamil Nadu with a 72 million population  is the closest  Indian state to Sri Lanka. Both Tamil Nadu and Sri Lanka are somewhat inter-twined historically and geographically.The Dravidian language Tamil is the  predominant language spoken in Tamil Nadu which means the land or country of the Tamils. More than 25% of the Sri Lankan population are  classified as Tamil – speaking people. A substantial number of Sri Lankans of different ethnicities are descendants of people who migrated to the Island from the South Indian states of Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
DMK members of Parliament will donate their one month’s salary towards Sri Lanka aid

In recent times , political developments in Tamil Nadu have  had much  impact on Sri Lanka and vice versa.Hence the the  politicl conduct of  the  Tamil Nadu chief minister is of  great  concrern and importance   to Sri  Lanka.  In that context  the  initiative taken by the Davida Munnetra Kazhagham(DMK) chief minister  Stalin in rendering humanitarin assistance to Sri Lanka deserves much praise. If utilised constructively, it could be the harbinger of  transformed relations  of a positive nature between the Island nation and the  South Indian state. If such a relationship could evolve , it would prove vastly beneficial to the people of Sri Lanka in more ways than one.

Such a relationship may have been unimaginable in the past but  hopefully it may be possible in the future.The  DMK electoral victory in  May last year and the ascendancy of Stalin as chief minister  seems to have mde a qualitative difference to Tamil Nadu. The pragmatic   chief minister has earned much kudos  during the past year for running  smoothly efficient administration. It is against this backdrop therefore that this column focuses on Tamil Nadu chief minister Stalin, from a Sri Lankan perspective,  in a two part article.Let me begin with a brief reference to  Stalin’s party the DMK and its erstwhile leader Karunanidhi, his father.

Muthuvel Karunanidhi, known to the Tamil-speaking world as “Kalaignar” (artiste),  passed away at the age of 94 in Chennai on 7 August 2018. Karunanidhi was a versatile, multi-faceted personality. In his eventful life “Kalaignar” was a journalist, editor, dramatist, stage actor, film script writer, short story writer, novelist, literary commentator, poet, lyricist, film producer and TV channel proprietor. Karunanidhi has written the screenplay and dialogues for 64 films. He has written the story or screenplay without dialogues for 11 other films.

It was Karunanidhi’s entry into filmdom which brought him much recognition and more remuneration in early life despite his lack of tertiary education. His rise in cinema helped him greatly to carve out a name for himself as a politician too. .  “Kalaignar” Karunanidhi’s ascendancy in politics basically corresponded with that of the DMK’s rise in Tamil Nadu

Karunanidhi  served as  Chief Minister of India’s Tamil Nadu state for a total of 19 years. He was Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu five times from 1969-71, 1971-76, 1989-91, 1996-2001 and 2006-11. No other Tamil Nadu chief minister has been in office for so long. Another record was that of being party leader for nearly 50 years. He was the undisputed leader of the Dravida Munnera Kazhagham (Dravidian Progressive Federation) since 1969, leading the party through thick and thin for 49 years. The Dravidian patriarch was first elected to the State legislative assembly in 1957 and never lost an election he contested personally since then. No Indian politician can boast of such an unbroken lengthy  record. “Kalaignar” Muthuvel Karunanidhi was no ordinary politico but a veritable political institution.

Muthuvel Karunanidhi Stalin or MK Stalin is the  third son of Muthuvel Karunanidhi who had six children from three wives. Karunanidhi’s first wife Padmavathy was the sister of well-known playback singer and music composer “Chidambaram” Jayaraman.She died shortly after giving birth to a son MK Muthu. After Padmavathy’s death Karunanidhi  married Dayalu and had three sons and a daughter by her. The sons are Alagiri, Stalin and Thamilarasu and the daughter is Selvi. In later years Karunanidhi had another wife Dharmambal alias Rajathy whose daughter is Kanimozhi.

Stalin is Karunanidhi’s fourth child and third son. He was born on March 1st 1953 in Madras now known as Chennai. Karunanidhi had named his eldest son Muthu  after his father Muthuvel. His second son Alagiri was named after well-known DK activist Pattukkottai Alagirisamy known as “Anjaanenjan Azhagiri”. In the case of his third son Stalin. Karunanidhi had originally named him Aiyadurai after his paternal grandfather Aiyadurai. However four days later,  the Soviet Union’s dictatorial ruler Joseh Stalin  died on March 5th 1953. Though named at birth in 1878 as Ioseb Jughashvil, he had   changed it in 1912  to Stalin meaning man of steel. Karunanidhi being a long- distance admirer of Stalin  registered  his new born son’s name as  Stalin  instead of Aiyadurai to honour the Communist stalwart.

Stalin had his primary and secondary education at the MCC Higher secondary school in Chetpet. By his own  frank admission young Stalin did not shine in studies or excel in sports, He was not even an able orator in Tamil. Furthermore  some of his teachers did not like his “communist”  name Stalin  or his father’s  Dravidian politics. There was one master  who would go through the daily ritual of rapping Stalin’s knuckled without any reason.Stalin completed his Pre-University Certificate(PUC) studies at Vivekananda College. Thereafter he enrolled at  Presidency College and followed  a BA degree  course in History.  Stalin dropped out without completing his studies in 1973 but three years later got his degree as an external student of Mardras University.

With his father becoming an MLA (Member of Legislative Assembly) in 1957, Stalin got interested in politics from childhood. His entry into active politics was at the age of 14 in 1967.  Karunanidhi’s nephew and Stalin’s cousin “Murasoli”Maran contested the   Madras South Parliament constituency by-election and young Stalin got involved in the election campaign. A year later in 1968,  15 year old Stalin launched the Gopalapuram DMK youth organization. The Karunanidhi residence was in Gopalapuram. This was the forerunner to the DMK’s youth wing.  Stalin identified himself with the DMK youth wing and built it up  as a formidable organization over   the years. He was the leader of the  DMK youth wing known as “Ilainjar Ani” for about three decades.. Salin was dubbed as “Thalapathy” (commander)  by his youthful disciples.In 1973 he was elected to he DMK general council.

Stalin’s political baptism of fire was in 1976. The then Indian Prime Minister Indira Gandhi declared  a state of emergency  and  clamped down on democratic rule in June  1975 when she was unseated through an election petition. The DMK held the reins in Tamil Nadu with  Karunanidhi as chief minister. Stalin himself got married during emergency rule on August 25th 1975 to Durga also known as Shantha. Karunanidhi and his DMK govt strongly opposed the emergency which angered Indira. On January 31st 1976, Indira Gandhi got the DMK govt dismissed and declared presidential rule. Thousands of DMK stalwarts and activists were  arrested and detained without trial under the Maintenance of Internal Security Act(MISA).

Though Karunanidhi was not arrested,  his newly married  politically active son was arrested on February 1st 1976 and jailed under the MISA. When the Police was taking Stalin away, Karunanidhi told his son not to be disheartened and that Indira Gandhi was launching Stalin’s political career by arresting him. Stalin was  kept in a cell at the Central prison in Chennai  amidst horrible conditions.He was  assaulted several times.

On one occasion  Stalin was brutally assaulted with rods. Unable to bear this sight, former Chennai Mayor and  Chengalpattu MP DMK  C. Chittibabu fell on top of Stalin and shielded him. Chittibabu was mercilessly beaten resulting in him losing consciousness and soon passing away. This brought an end to the beatings. Stalin was detained for 13 months under MISA regulations. The silver lining was that he managed to complete his BA studies during this time.

After being released Stalin plunged into full -time politics. As his father predicted the detention during emergency rule was indeed a launching pad for  Stalin’s political career. He first contested the “Aayiram Vilakku”(housand lights) constituency withing Chennai city limits in 1984. He lost. In 1989 he contested again, won and became an MLA for the first time. He lost again in the 1991 polls. He was triumphant at Aayiram Vilakku in the 1 996, 2001 and 2006 state elections. In 2011 Stalin shifted to Kolathur a Chennai suburban constituency and won. He retained Kolathur in 2016 as well as in th 2021 election.

The earlier system of  Municipal  elections was amended and provision was made for a directly elected  Mayor in 1996. Stalin contested the Chennai(formerly Madras) municipal corporation elections in 1996 and became the city’s first directly elected  Mayor. He proved to be an able administrator and implemented   infra-structure development projects. Apart from schemes of  road widening, drinking water supply, electrification, schools, health clinics  and drainage improvement, Mayor Stalin also constructed nine fly-over bridges. He also streamlined garbage clearance and road maintenance by privatizing them.

Mayor Stalin’s pet project however was a beautification scheme for the city known as “Singaara Chennai”(Beautiful Chennai). He received much praise  for this. He was re-elected as Chennaai Mayor in 2001. Although Stalin would have liked to continue as the first citizen of Chennai for another term after 2001 ,he was debarred from doing so by AIADMK chief minister Jayalalitha Jayaram who passed legislation with retrospective effect   in 2002 forbidding  persons from being Mayor and MLA  simultaneously. Stalin opted to be a legislator.

Stalin also gained ascendancy within the party. He first became secretary of the DMK Youth wing in 1982 and served in that capacity for a very long time. In 2003 , Stalin became deputy general secretary of the DMK. In 2008 he was elected as Treasurer of the DMK. The DMK formed the State Govt in 2006 with Karunanidhi as chief minister.  Stalin was appointed  Minister for Rural Development and Local Administration.In May 2009, Karunanidhi created the post of deputy chief minister and appointed his son  as “Thunai Mudhalvar”. The DMK suffered a great debacle in the 2011 Tamil Nadu election. The  party got only 23 seats and even  forfeited the leader of the opposition post to actor Vijayakanth whose Desiya Mutpoakku Dravida Kazhagam(DMDK) got 29 seats.

While the father continued to be  party leader, the son began to consolidate himself within the DMK and became the de facto leader.With his health deteriorating. Karunanidhi formally “anointed” Stalin as his political  heir in January 2013. Addressing party office-bearers at a special meeting,  Karunanidhi said, “I will work for the upliftment and development of people till my last breath. For the question `what after me`, Stalin, who is seated here, is the answer, and you should not forget this.”

The 2016 State elections saw the nonagenarian  Karunanidhi now confined to a wheel chair take a back seat during the election campaign. Stalin spearheaded the DMK led alliance  into getting 98 seats of which the DMK shae was 89. The Jayalalithaa led AIADMK  was re-elected  to power with 136 seats. Stalin became leader of the opposition. In 2016  September Jayalalithaa fell seriously ill and OS Panneerselvam became acting Chief Minister. In December 2016 Jayalalithaa passed away. Edappaadi K Palaniswamy became the AIADMK chief minister.

In January 2017,  Stalin was formally  elevated in the party hierarchy as “Seyal Thalaiver” or working President. While the indisposed Karunanidhi remained  the nominal DML president, the party closed ranks behind Stalin’s leadership. Karunanidhi passed away in August 2018 and Stalin was unanimously elected President of the DMK. There were many who doubted whether Stalin could fill the void caused by Karunanidhi’s demise. Also Stalin was compared (unfairly) to his illustrious father and found wanting.

While delivering his inaugural speech as DMK president, Stalin struck a responsive chord within the audience by  repeating the words used by Karunanidhi in addressing a party gathering. Stalin said, “En uyirinum melana anbu udan pirapukkaley (my beloved siblings who I love more than life itself).” He then turned emotional and said  that he was totally  unlike  his father. “I don’t know to talk like him, I cannot talk like him, I cannot own the language like him. But I stand before you with the guts to try anything.” Stalin  then pledged to protect, cherish and advance the four founding principles of the party. “I aim to lead Tamil Nadu on the path of self-respect, equality, social justice using this party,” said the new President of the DMK.

Stalin was true to his word and strove to lead the DMK along the course charted by Annadurai and Karunanidhi. He proved his mettle in the 2019 Lok Sabha elections  when the DMK led alliance won 38 of the 39 seats allocated to Tamil Nadu in the Indian Parliament. Stalin has demonstrated his “winnability” again by leading the DMK to victory in the 2021 polls.
This Article  was written for the “Political Pulse” Column Appearing in the “Daily FT”of June 15th 2022.It can be accessed here-
